Motivated by the theoretical insight that changes in entropy are governed by the covariance between token probabilities and their corresponding advantages, we propose a hyperparameter-free, covariance-weighted optimization method that dynamically down-weights extreme token-level updates via a Gaussian kernel. This approach automatically reduces the instability caused by exploration-exploitation trade-off while preserving informative learning signals. Extensive empirical evaluations show that our approach improves downstream performance across reasoning benchmarks compared with GRPO, and effectively stablizes entropy as training progresses.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于协方差加权的优化方法，通过高斯核动态调节token级更新，解决了GRPO在探索-利用权衡中的不稳定性问题。
AI.motivation: GRPO方法在提升大语言模型推理能力时存在探索-利用权衡的困难，经常导致训练不理想，性能次优。
AI.method: 基于熵变化受token概率与相应优势协方差控制的理论洞察，提出超参数免费的协方差加权优化方法，使用高斯核动态降低极端token级更新的影响。
AI.result: 实验证明该方法相比GRPO在多个推理基准测试中提升了下游性能，并有效稳定了训练过程中的熵值。
AI.conclusion: 提出的协方差加权方法能自动减少探索-利用权衡带来的不稳定性，同时保留有用学习信号，为大语言模型推理能力提升提供了更稳定的训练方案。

title: PresentAgent-2: Towards Generalist Multimodal Presentation Agents
summary: Presentation generation is moving beyond static slide creation toward end-to-end presentation video generation with research grounding, multimodal media, and interactive delivery. We introduce PresentAgent-2, an agentic framework for generating presentation videos from user queries. Given an open-ended user query and a selected presentation mode, PresentAgent-2 first summarizes the query into a focused topic and performs deep research over presentation-friendly sources to collect multimodal resources, including relevant text, images, GIFs, and videos. It then constructs presentation slides, generates mode-specific scripts, and composes slides, audio, and dynamic media into a complete presentation video. PresentAgent-2 supports three independent presentation modes within a unified framework: Single Presentation, which generates a single-speaker narrated presentation video; Discussion, which creates a multi-speaker presentation with structured speaker roles, such as for asking guiding questions, explaining concepts, clarifying details, and summarizing key points; and Interaction, which independently supports answering audience questions grounded in the generated slides, scripts, retrieved evidence, and presentation context. To evaluate these capabilities, we build a multimodal presentation benchmark covering single presentation, discussion, and interaction scenarios, with task-specific evaluation criteria for content quality, media relevance, dynamic media use, dialogue naturalness, and interaction grounding. Overall, PresentAgent-2 extends presentation generation from document-dependent slide creation to query-driven, research-grounded presentation video generation with multimodal media, dialogue, and interaction. Code: https://github.com/AIGeeksGroup/PresentAgent-2. Website: https://aigeeksgroup.github.io/PresentAgent-2.

AI.tldr: PresentAgent-2是一个智能代理框架，能够根据用户查询自动生成包含深度研究、多模态媒体和交互功能的多模式演示视频，支持单人讲解、多人讨论和问答交互三种模式。
AI.motivation: 传统演示生成主要局限于基于文档的静态幻灯片创建，无法实现端到端的演示视频生成。随着多模态技术和交互式需求的增长，需要一个新的框架来实现从查询到完整演示视频的自动化生成，包括研究基础、媒体整合和互动功能。
AI.method: PresentAgent-2框架首先将开放性用户查询总结为聚焦主题，然后对演示友好的源进行深度研究收集多模态资源（文本、图像、GIF、视频），接着构建演示幻灯片并生成模式特定脚本，最后将幻灯片、音频和动态媒体组合成完整演示视频。系统支持三种独立模式：单人讲解、多人结构化讨论和基于证据的问答交互。
AI.result: 构建了一个多模态演示基准测试，涵盖单人演示、讨论和交互场景，建立了针对内容质量、媒体相关性、动态媒体使用、对话自然性和交互基础的任务特定评估标准。
AI.conclusion: PresentAgent-2成功将演示生成从依赖文档的幻灯片创建扩展到查询驱动、基于研究的多模态演示视频生成，实现了演示生成的重大突破，为自动化演示创作提供了新的技术路径。

title: Three Regimes of Context-Parametric Conflict: A Predictive Framework and Empirical Validation
comment: 10 pages, 13 tables, no figures. 9,970 API calls across five frontier models
summary: The literature on how large language models handle conflict between their training knowledge and a contradicting document presents a persistent empirical contradiction: some studies find models stubbornly retain their trained answers, ignoring provided documents nearly half the time, while others find models readily defer to the document, following context approximately 96% of the time. We argue these contradictions dissolve once one recognises that prior experiments have studied three qualitatively distinct processing situations without distinguishing them. We propose a three-regime framework: Regime 1 (single-source updating, dominant predictor: evidence coherence), Regime 2 (competitive integration, dominant predictor: parametric certainty), and Regime 3 (task-appropriate selection, dominant predictor: task knowledge requirement). We formalise a distinction between parametric strength (exposure frequency) and parametric uniqueness (encoding consistency), showing empirically that these are orthogonal dimensions (r = -0.002, p = .97) with strength as the operative predictor in stable factual domains. We validate the framework across Claude Sonnet 4.6, GPT-5.5, Gemini 2.5 Flash, Llama 4 Maverick, and DeepSeek V3 using 9,970 API calls in three experimental phases. GEE logistic regression confirms the predicted Regime 2 certainty gradient for all five models (beta = -0.38 to -0.50, all p <= .013, BH-FDR corrected). A Regime 3 ablation shows task framing alone flips context-following from near-100% (contextual knowledge condition) to 6-71% (parametric knowledge condition), with all five models significant (p < .001). The certainty gradient is robust to multinomial outcome modeling, sensitivity analyses for hedging responses, and FDR correction.

AI.tldr: 研究提出了一个三机制框架来解释大型语言模型在处理训练知识与矛盾文档冲突时的不同行为模式，解决了现有文献中的经验矛盾。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在LLM如何处理知识与文档冲突上存在 contradictory 发现：有些显示模型固执地保留训练答案，忽略文档近50%时间；其他则显示模型轻易地遵循文档96%时间。这种矛盾阻碍了对模型行为的理解。
AI.method: 提出三机制框架：机制1（单源更新，证据 coherence 主导）、机制2（竞争整合，参数确定性主导）、机制3（任务适选，任务知识需求主导）。形式化区分参数强度（暴露频率）和参数唯一性（编码一致性），并通过9,970次API调用在5个模型上验证框架。
AI.result: GEE逻辑回归确认所有5个模型的机制2确定性梯度（beta = -0.38到-0.50，p ≤ .013）。机制3消融显示任务框架单因素就能使上下文遵循率从近100%降至6-71%（p < .001）。确定性梯度在多项结果建模、对冲响应敏感性分析和FDR校正下均稳健。
AI.conclusion: 不同研究间的矛盾源自未区分三种本质上不同的处理机制。三机制框架统一了解释了模型行为差异，参数强度是稳定事实领域的操作性预测因子，任务框架对知识选择策略有决定性影响。

title: 3D-Belief: Embodied Belief Inference via Generative 3D World Modeling
summary: Recent advances in visual generative models have highlighted the promise of learning generative world models. However, most existing approaches frame world modeling as novel-view synthesis or future-frame prediction, emphasizing visual realism rather than the structured uncertainty required by embodied agents acting under partial observability. In this work, we propose a different perspective: world modeling as embodied belief inference in 3D space. From this view, a world model should not merely render what may be seen, but maintain and update an agent's belief about the unobserved 3D world as new observations are acquired. We identify several key capabilities for such models, including spatially consistent scene memory, multi-hypothesis belief sampling, sequential belief updating, and semantically informed prediction of unseen regions. We instantiate these ideas in 3D-Belief, a generative 3D world model that infers explicit, actionable 3D beliefs from partial observations and updates them online over time. Unlike prior visual prediction models, 3D-Belief represents uncertainty directly in 3D, enabling embodied agents to imagine plausible scene completions and reason over partially observed environments. We evaluate 3D-Belief on 2D visual quality for scene memory and unobserved-scene imagination, object- and scene-level 3D imagination using our proposed 3D-CORE benchmark, and challenging object navigation tasks in both simulation and the real world. Experiments show that 3D-Belief improves 2D and 3D imagination quality and downstream embodied task performance compared to state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了3D-Belief，一个生成式3D世界模型，将世界建模重新定义为3D空间中的具身信念推理，能够从部分观测中推断并更新显式的3D信念，显著提升了想象质量和下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉生成模型主要关注新颖视图合成或未来帧预测，强调视觉真实感，而忽略了具身智能体在部分可观性下需要的结构化不确定性。因此需要一种新的世界建模视角。
AI.method: 提出将世界建模视为3D空间中的具身信念推理，开发了3D-Belief模型，具备空间一致的场景记忆、多假设信念采样、序列信念更新和语义信息预测等关键能力，直接在3D中表示不确定性。
AI.result: 通过2D视觉质​​量评估、3D对象和场景想象评估（3D-CORE基准测试）以及仿真和真实世界的物体导航任务，验证了3D-Belief在想象质量和任务性能上都优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 3D-Belief成功实现了从部分观测中推断和更新3D信念的目标，为具身智能体提供了更好的环境推理能力，推动了世界建模从视觉真实感向结构化不确定性推理的转变。

title: BitLM: Unlocking Multi-Token Language Generation with Bitwise Continuous Diffusion
summary: Autoregressive language models generate text one token at a time, yet natural language is inherently structured in multi-token units, including phrases, n-grams, and collocations that carry meaning jointly. This one-token bottleneck limits both the expressiveness of the model during pre-training and its throughput at inference time. Existing remedies such as speculative decoding or diffusion-based language models either leave the underlying bottleneck intact or sacrifice the causal structure essential to language modeling. We propose BitLM, a language model that represents each token as a fixed-length binary code and employs a lightweight diffusion head to denoise multiple tokens in parallel within each block. Crucially, BitLM preserves left-to-right causal attention across blocks while making joint lexical decisions within each block, combining the reliability of autoregressive modeling with the parallelism of iterative refinement. By replacing the large-vocabulary softmax with bitwise denoising, BitLM reframes token generation as iterative commitment in a compact binary space, enabling more efficient pre-training and substantially faster inference without altering the causal foundation that makes language models effective. Our results demonstrate that the one-token-at-a-time paradigm is not a fundamental requirement but an interface choice, and that changing it can yield a stronger and faster language model. We hope BitLM points toward a promising direction for next-generation language model architectures.

AI.tldr: BitLM通过将token表示为二进制编码，在每个块内使用轻量级扩散头并行去噪多个token，在保持自回归因果结构的同时突破了单token生成的瓶颈，实现了更高效的预训练和更快的推理。
AI.motivation: 传统的自回归语言模型逐个token生成的方式产生了单token瓶颈，限制了模型在预训练时的表达能力和推理时的吞吐量。现有解决方案要么保留了根本瓶颈，要么牺牲了语言建模必需的因果结构。
AI.method: BitLM将每个token表示为固定长度的二进制编码，在每个注意力块内使用轻量级扩散头并行去噪多个token。模型保持块间的左到右因果注意力，但在每个块内进行联合词汇决策，用位级去噪替代大词汇量softmax。
AI.result: BitLM突破了逐token范式，实现了更高效的预训练和显著更快的推理速度，同时保持了使语言模型有效的因果基础，展示了更强大、更快的语言模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 逐token生成范式并非根本要求，而是一种接口选择。通过改变这一选择可以获得更强更快的语言模型。BitLM为下一代语言模型架构指明了一个有前景的方向。

title: Dynamic Full-body Motion Agent with Object Interaction via Blending Pre-trained Modular Controllers
summary: Generating physically plausible dynamic motions of human-object interaction (HOI) remains challenging, mainly due to existing HOI datasets limited to static interactions, and pretrained agents capable of either dynamic full-body motions without objects or static HOI motions. Recent works such as InsActor and CLoSD generate HOI motions in planning and execution stages, are yet limited to either static or short-term contacts e.g. striking. In this work, we propose a framework that fulfills dynamic and long-term interaction motions such as running while holding a table, by combining pretrained motion priors and imitation agents in planning and execution stages. In the planning stage, we augment HOI datasets with dynamic priors from a pretrained human motion diffusion model, followed by object trajectory generation. This plans dynamic HOI sequences. In the execution stage, a composer network blends actions of pretrained imitation agents specialized either for dynamic human motions or static HOI motions, enabling spatio-temporal composition of their complementary skills. Our method over relevant prior-arts consistently improves success rates while maintaining interaction for dynamic HOI tasks. Furthermore, blending pretrained experts with our composer achieves competitive performance in significantly reduced training time. Ablation studies validate the effectiveness of our augmentation and composer blending.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个结合预训练运动先验和模仿智能体的框架，用于生成动态且长期的人物交互动作，如手持桌子跑步。
AI.motivation: 现有人物交互数据集局限于静态交互，预训练智能体要么只生成交互物体的动态全身运动，要么只能生成静态人物交互动作，缺乏动态长期交互能力。
AI.method: 框架分规划阶段和执行阶段：规划阶段用预训练人体运动扩散模型的动态先验增强HOI数据集，然后生成物体轨迹；执行阶段通过组合器网络融合专门处理动态人体运动和静态HOI运动的预训练模仿智能体的动作。
AI.result: 该方法在相关基准测试中持续提高成功率，在动态HOI任务中保持交互，同时在显著减少训练时间的情况下达到竞争性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的规划和执行框架有效解决了动态长期人物交互动作生成的挑战，组合器网络的成功融合证明了预训练专家互补技能时序组合的有效性。

title: Ada-MK: Adaptive MegaKernel Optimization via Automated DAG-based Search for LLM Inference
summary: When large language models (LLMs) serve real-time inference in commercial online advertising systems, end-to-end latency must be strictly bounded to the millisecond range. Yet every token generated during the decode phase triggers thousands of kernel launches, and kernel launch overhead alone can account for 14.6% of end-to-end inference time. MegaKernel eliminates launch overhead and inter-operator HBM round-trips by fusing multiple operators into a single persistent kernel. However, existing MegaKernel implementations face a fundamental tension between portability and efficiency on resource-constrained GPUs such as NVIDIA Ada: hand-tuned solutions are tightly coupled to specific architectures and lack portability, while auto-compiled approaches introduce runtime dynamic scheduling whose branch penalties are unacceptable in latency-critical settings. We observe that under a fixed deployment configuration, the optimal execution path of a MegaKernel is uniquely determined, and runtime dynamic decision-making can be entirely hoisted to compile time. Building on this insight, we propose Ada-MK: (1) a three-dimensional shared-memory constraint model combined with K-dimension splitting that reduces peak shared memory usage by 50%; (2) MLIR-based fine-grained DAG offline search that solidifies the optimal execution path, completely eliminating runtime branching; and (3) a heterogeneous hybrid inference engine that embeds MegaKernel as a plugin into TensorRT-LLM, combining high-throughput Prefill with low-latency Decode. On an NVIDIA L20, Ada-MK improves single-batch throughput by up to 23.6% over vanilla TensorRT-LLM and 50.2% over vLLM, achieving positive gains across all tested scenarios--the first industrial deployment of MegaKernel in a commercial online advertising system.

AI.tldr: Ada-MK通过编译时优化和共享内存约束模型，在NVIDIA Ada GPU上实现了MegaKernel的高效部署，显著降低了LLM推理延迟，首次在商业在线广告系统中成功部署。
AI.motivation: 在商业在线广告系统中，LLM需要毫秒级的实时推理延迟，但现有MegaKernel实现在便携性与效率之间存在根本冲突，无法满足资源受限GPU部署需求。
AI.method: 提出三维共享内存约束模型结合K维度分片、基于MLIR的细粒度DAG离线搜索优化，以及将MegaKernel嵌入TensorRT-LLM的异构混合推理引擎。
AI.result: 在NVIDIA L20上，单批吞吐量比vanilla TensorRT-LLM提升23.6%，比vLLM提升50.2%，在所有测试场景中均实现正向增益。
AI.conclusion: 首次成功在商业在线广告系统中部署MegaKernel，通过编译时决策替代运行时动态调度，解决了便携性与效率的平衡问题，为延迟敏感的LLM推理部署提供了有效方案。

title: HamBR: Active Decision Boundary Restoration Based on Hamiltonian Dynamics for Learning with Noisy Labels
summary: In large-scale visual recognition and data mining tasks, the presence of noisy labels severely undermines the generalization capability of deep neural networks (DNNs). Prevalent sample selection methods rely primarily on training loss or prediction confidence for passive screening. However, within a feature space degraded by noise, decision boundaries undergo systematic boundary collapse. This phenomenon hinders the ability of the model to distinguish between hard clean samples and noisy samples at the decision margins, thereby creating a significant performance bottleneck. This study is the first to emphasize the pivotal importance of active boundary restoration for noise-robust learning. We propose HamBR, a novel paradigm based on Hamiltonian dynamics. The core approach leverages the Spherical Hamiltonian Monte Carlo (Spherical HMC) mechanism to actively probe inter-class ambiguous regions within the representation space and synthesize high-quality virtual outliers. By imposing explicit repulsion constraints via energy-based modeling, these synthesized samples establish robust energy barriers at the decision boundaries. This mechanism forces real samples to move from dispersed overlapping regions toward their respective class centers, thereby restoring the discriminative sharpness of the decision boundaries. HamBR demonstrates exceptional versatility and can be integrated as a plug-and-play defense module into existing semi-supervised noisy label learning frameworks. Empirical evaluations show that the proposed paradigm significantly enhances the discriminative accuracy of hard boundary samples, achieving state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance on CIFAR-10/100 and real-world noise benchmarks. Furthermore, it exhibits superior convergence efficiency and reliable robustness, while improving significantly the capability of the model for Out-of-Distribution (OOD) detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于哈密顿动力学的新方法HamBR，通过主动探测类间模糊区域并合成高质量虚拟离群点来恢复噪声环境下的决策边界，显著提升了深度神经网络的噪声鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 在大规模视觉识别任务中，噪声标签严重影响DNN的泛化能力。现有基于损失或置信度的样本选择方法在噪声退化的特征空间中遭遇系统性边界坍塌，难以区分困难干净样本与噪声样本，成为性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出HamBR框架，利用球面哈密顿蒙特卡洛(Spherical HMC)机制主动探测表示空间中的类间模糊区域，合成高质量虚拟离群点。通过基于能量建模的显式排斥约束，这些合成样本在决策边界处建立鲁棒能量屏障，迫使真实样本从重叠区域向各自类中心移动，恢复决策边界的判别性。
AI.result: 该方法显著提升了困难边界样本的判别准确性，在CIFAR-10/100和真实噪声基准测试上达到SOTA性能，同时展现出优越的收敛效率、可靠鲁棒性以及分布外检测能力的显著改善。
AI.conclusion: HamBR作为一种即插即用的防御模块，可集成到现有半监督噪声标签学习框架中，通过主动边界恢复机制有效解决了噪声学习中的决策边界坍塌问题，为噪声鲁棒学习提供了新范式。

title: Efficient LLM-based Advertising via Model Compression and Parallel Verification
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown remarkable potential in advertising scenarios such as ad creative generation and targeted advertising. However, deploying LLMs in real-time advertising systems poses significant challenges due to their high inference latency and computational cost. In this paper, we propose an Efficient Generative Targeting framework that integrates adaptive group quantization, layer-adaptive hierarchical sparsification, and prefix-tree parallel verification to accelerate LLM inference while preserving generation quality. Extensive experiments on two real-world advertising scenarios demonstrate that our framework achieves significant speedup with acceptable quality degradation, making it operationally viable for practical deployments.

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效生成式定位框架，通过自适应分组量化、分层自适应稀疏化和前缀树并行验证技术，在保持生成质量的同时显著加速LLM推理过程，适用于实时广告系统。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在广告创意生成和定向广告等场景表现优异，但其高推理延迟和计算成本严重阻碍了在实时广告系统中的实际部署。
AI.method: 开发了Efficient Generative Targeting框架，集成了三项关键技术：自适应分组量化技术减少计算精度需求，层自适应分层稀疏化选择性激活网络层，前缀树并行验证加速推理验证过程。
AI.result: 在两个真实广告场景的实验中，框架实现了显著的推理加速倍数，同时保持了可接受的生成质量，证明了其在实际部署中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了LLM实时部署的推理效率问题，为广告系统中大规模应用生成模型提供了切实可行的优化方案。

title: JACoP: Joint Alignment for Compliant Multi-Agent Prediction
summary: Stochastic Human Trajectory Prediction (HTP) using generative modeling has emerged as a significant area of research. Although state-of-the-art models excel in optimizing the accuracy of individual agents, they often struggle to generate predictions that are collectively compliant, leading to output trajectories marred by social collisions and environmental violations, thus rendering them impractical for real-world applications. To bridge this gap, we present JACoP: Joint Alignment for Compliant Multi-Agent Prediction, an innovative multi-stage framework that ensures scene-level plausibility. JACoP incorporates an Anchor-Based Agent-Centric Profiler for effective initial compliance filtering and employs a Markov Random Field (MRF) based aligner to formalize the joint selection for scene predictions. By representing inter-agent spatial and social costs as MRF energy potentials, we successfully infer and sample from the joint trajectory distribution, achieving prediction with optimal scene compliance. Comprehensive experiments show that JACoP not only achieves competitive accuracy, but also sets a new standard in reducing both environmental violations and social collisions, thereby confirming its ability to produce collectively feasible and practically applicable trajectory predictions.

AI.tldr: JACoP是一个多阶段框架，通过基于锚点的合规性过滤器和马尔可夫随机场对齐器，实现了符合社会规则且环境合规的多智能体轨迹预测。
AI.motivation: 现有随机轨迹预测模型虽能优化单个代理的精度，但生成的预测轨迹常出现社交碰撞和环境违规问题，不适合实际应用。
AI.method: 提出JACoP框架，包含基于锚点的代理中心剖面仪进行初始合规过滤，以及基于马尔可夫随机场的对齐器，将智能体间空间和社会成本表示为MRF能量势，从联合轨迹分布中推理和采样。
AI.result: 实验表明JACoP在保持竞争性准确率的同时，显著减少了环境违规和社交碰撞，在场景合规性方面建立了新标准。
AI.conclusion: JACoP成功实现了集体可行且实用的轨迹预测，为实际应用提供了可靠的多智能体轨迹预测解决方案。

title: DiffScore: Text Evaluation Beyond Autoregressive Likelihood
summary: Autoregressive language models are widely used for text evaluation, however, their left-to-right factorization introduces positional bias, i.e., early tokens are scored with only leftward context, conflating architectural asymmetry with true text quality. We propose masked reconstruction as an alternative paradigm, where every token is scored using full bidirectional context. We introduce DiffScore, an evaluation framework built on Masked Large Diffusion Language Models. By measuring text recoverability across continuous masking rates, DiffScore eliminates positional bias and naturally establishes an evaluation hierarchy from local fluency to global coherence. We further provide diagnostic tools unavailable to autoregressive frameworks: multi-timestep quality profiles that decompose scores across masking rates, and bidirectional PMI decomposition that disentangles fluency from faithfulness. Experiments across ten benchmarks show that DiffScore consistently outperforms autoregressive baselines in both zero-shot and fine-tuned settings. The code is released at: https://github.com/wenlai-lavine/DiffScore.

AI.tldr: DiffScore是一种基于掩码扩散语言模型的文本评估框架，通过双向上下文消除位置偏差，提供从局部流畅性到全局一致性的多维度评估。
AI.motivation: 传统的自回归语言模型采用从左到右的分解方式，导致早期token只能看到左侧上下文，引入了位置偏差，将架构不对称性与真实文本质量混为一谈。
AI.method: 提出掩码重建作为替代范式，每个token都在完整双向上下文下评分；构建基于掩码大规模扩散语言模型的DiffScore框架；通过连续掩码率测量文本可恢复性。
AI.result: 在十个基准测试中，DiffScore在零样本和微调设置下均优于自回归基线模型，提供了多时间步质量分析和双向PMI分解等诊断工具。
AI.conclusion: DiffScore成功消除了位置偏差，建立了从局部流畅性到全局一致性的评估层次，为文本质量评估提供了更准确且多维度的新方法。

title: VidSplat: Gaussian Splatting Reconstruction with Geometry-Guided Video Diffusion Priors
comment: Accepted by SIGGRAPH Conference 2026. Project Page: https://tangjm24.github.io/VidSplat
summary: Gaussian Splatting has achieved remarkable progress in multi-view surface reconstruction, yet it exhibits notable degradation when only few views are available. Although recent efforts alleviate this issue by enhancing multi-view consistency to produce plausible surfaces, they struggle to infer unseen, occluded, or weakly constrained regions beyond the input coverage. To address this limitation, we present VidSplat, a training-free generative reconstruction framework that leverages powerful video diffusion priors to iteratively synthesize novel views that compensate for missing input coverage, and thereby recover complete 3D scenes from sparse inputs. Specifically, we tackle two key challenges that enable the effective integration of generation and reconstruction. First, for 3D consistent generation, we elaborate a training-free, stage-wise denoising strategy that adaptively guides the denoising direction toward the underlying geometry using the rendered RGB and mask images. Second, to enhance the reconstruction, we develop an iterative mechanism that samples camera trajectories, explores unobserved regions, synthesizes novel views, and supplements training through confidence weighted refinement. VidSplat performs robustly to sparse input and even a single image. Extensive experiments on widely used benchmarks demonstrate our superior performance in sparse-view scene reconstruction.

AI.tldr: VidSplat是一个无训练的生成式重建框架，利用视频扩散先验从稀疏视图生成新视角，实现完整3D场景重建。
AI.motivation: 高斯泼溅在稀疏视图情况下出现显著退化，现有方法虽然增强了多视图一致性，但难以推断输入覆盖范围之外的不可见、遮挡或弱约束区域。
AI.method: 提出双阶段策略：1) 无训练的3D一致性去噪策略，使用渲染的RGB和掩码图像自适应引导去噪方向；2) 迭代机制，采样相机轨迹探索未观测区域，合成新视角，通过置信度加权细化补充训练。
AI.result: 在广泛使用的基准测试中，VidSplat在稀疏视图场景重建上表现出优越性能，对稀疏输入甚至单张图像都能鲁棒工作。
AI.conclusion: 通过有效整合生成和重建，VidSplat成功解决了稀疏视图重建中缺失区域推断的挑战，为完整3D场景重建提供了新的解决途径。

title: PRISM: A Geometric Risk Bound that Decomposes Drift into Scale, Shape, and Head
summary: Comparing post-training LLM variants, such as quantized, LoRA-adapted, and distilled models, requires a diagnostic that identifies how a variant has drifted, not only whether it has degraded. Existing similarity scores such as CKA and SVCCA can flag degradation, but they do not directly link representation drift to risk or mechanism. We propose PRISM, Proxy Risk Inference via Structural Mapping, which exploits the linear output head of LLMs and the empirically near-isometric structure of their backbones to derive a closed-form upper bound on the cross-entropy risk gap between a target model and a post-training variant. The bound is calibrated for variant ranking and decomposes drift into three independently measurable axes: scale mismatch, shape mismatch, and head divergence. Each axis corresponds to a distinct failure mode, including shape distortion under low-bit quantization, scale separability under LoRA forgetting, and head divergence under GGUF k-quantization. As a result, the dominant axis suggests a remediation direction rather than merely raising a degradation flag. Because the shape term is differentiable, the same geometry can also serve as a training-time regularizer against catastrophic forgetting. Across two model families and five benchmarks, PRISM ranks variants with mean Spearman correlations of 0.820 for post-training quantization and 0.831 for LoRA forgetting, and its axis-guided shape regularizer outperforms experience replay in aggregate at mitigating downstream forgetting.

AI.tldr: PRISM提出了一种新的诊断方法，通过闭合形式上界分析LLM变体（量化、LoRA适配、蒸馏模型）的表征漂移，将漂移分解为三个可测量的失效模式轴，并提供修复指导。
AI.motivation: 现有的相似性评分方法（如CKA、SVCCA）只能检测LLM变体的性能退化，无法定位具体的失效机制或提供修复建议。需要一种能直接关联表征漂移与风险的诊断工具。
AI.method: PRISM利用LLM的线性输出头和骨干网络的经验近等距结构，推导出目标模型与后训练变体之间交叉熵风险差距的闭合形式上界，并将漂移分解为尺度失配、形状失配和头部发散三个独立可测量的轴。
AI.result: 在两个模型家族和五个基准测试中，PRISM对变体排序的平均Spearman相关性达到0.820（量化）和0.831（LoRA遗忘），其轴指导的形状正则化器在缓解下游遗忘方面整体优于经验回放。
AI.conclusion: PRISM不仅能够有效检测和量化LLM变体的表征漂移，还能识别具体的失效模式并提供针对性的修复方向，同时可作为训练时的正则化器防止灾难性遗忘。

title: PD-4DGS:Progressive Decomposition of 4D Gaussian Splatting for Bandwidth-Adaptive Dynamic Scene Streaming
summary: 4D Gaussian Splatting (4DGS) enables high-quality dynamic novel view synthesis, yet current models remain monolithic bitstreams that clients must download in full before any frame can be rendered, causing black-screen waits of tens to hundreds of seconds on mobile bandwidth and leaving 4DGS incompatible with modern adaptive-bitrate delivery. Progressive 3DGS compression alleviates this for static scenes, but it acts only on spatial anchors and cannot partition the temporal deformation networks that dominate dynamic-scene size. We present PD-4DGS, the first framework for progressive compression and on-demand transmission of 4DGS. Hierarchical Deformation Decomposition (HDD) externalises the coarse-to-fine motion hierarchy already latent in 4DGS into three independently transmittable layers -- a static scaffold, a global deformation, and a local refinement -- so that any prefix of the bitstream is already renderable, turning a single training run into a scalable, DASH/HLS-compatible bitstream. A Gaussian-entropy attribute rate-distortion loss together with a temporal mask consistency regulariser shrink the base layer while suppressing low-bitrate flicker; a capacity-weighted rollout schedule, gated online by a learnt activation rate rho, then prevents deformation-network under-training without any per-scene hyperparameter. On the Dycheck iPhone benchmark, PD-4DGS cuts the streamed bitstream by >60% at matched rendering fidelity and reduces first-frame latency from 73--930 s to ~1.7 s on a 2 Mbps link, uniquely enabling true on-demand progressive streaming for 4DGS.

AI.tldr: PD-4DGS是首个支持4D高斯溅射渐进式压缩和按需传输的框架，通过分层变形分解将动态场景分解为三层独立传输的层次，实现首帧延迟从73-930秒降至约1.7秒，流传输比特率降低60%以上。
AI.motivation: 现有4D高斯溅射模型是单体比特流，客户端必须完整下载才能渲染帧，在移动带宽下导致数十到数百秒的黑屏等待，且与现代自适应比特率传输不兼容。渐进式3DGS压缩无法处理动态场景中占主导地位的时序变形网络。
AI.method: 提出分层变形分解(HDD)将4DGS中潜在的从粗到细运动层次外化为三个独立可传输层：静态支架、全局变形和局部细化；使用高斯熵属性率失真损失和时序掩码一致性正则化基层，抑制低比特率闪烁；采用容量加权展开策略通过学习激活率ρ在线控制，无需场景特定超参数防止变形网络欠训练。
AI.result: 在Dycheck iPhone基准测试上，PD-4DGS在相同渲染保真度下将流传输比特率降低60%以上，在2Mbps链路下将首帧延迟从73-930秒降至约1.7秒，首次实现了4DGS的真正按需渐进式流传输。
AI.conclusion: PD-4DGS成功将单体4DGS模型转换为可扩展、兼容DASH/HLS的比特流，使任意比特流前缀都可渲染，为4DGS的渐进式流传输奠定了基础。

title: When Emotion Becomes Trigger: Emotion-style dynamic Backdoor Attack Parasitising Large Language Models
summary: Backdoor vulnerabilities widely exist in the fine-tuning of large language models(LLMs). Most backdoor poisoning methods operate mainly at the token level and lack deeper semantic manipulation, which limits stealthiness. In addition, Prior attacks rely on a single fixed trigger to induce harmful outputs. Such static triggers are easy to detect, and clean fine-tuning can weaken the trigger-target association. Through causal validation, we observe that emotion is not directly linked to individual words, but functions as an overall stylistic factor through tone. In the representation space of LLM, emotion can be decoupled from semantics, forming distinct cluster from the original neutral text. Therefore, we consider the emotional factor as the backdoor trigger to propose a pparasitic emotion-style dynamic backdoor attack, Paraesthesia. By mixing samples with the emotional trigger into clean data and then fine-tuning the model, the model is able to generate the predefined attack response when encountering emotional inputs during the inference stage. Paraesthesia includes two the quantification and rewriting of emotional styles. We evaluate the effectiveness of our method on instruction-following generation and classification tasks. The experimental results show that Paraesthesia achieves an attack success rate of around 99\% across both task types and four different models, while maintaining the clean utility of the models.

AI.tldr: Paraesthesia是一种基于情感风格的动态后门攻击方法，通过情感因素作为触发器，在LLM微调阶段植入后门，推理时遇到情感输入即可触发预设攻击响应。
AI.motivation: 现有后门攻击主要在词级层面操作，缺乏深层语义操控且隐蔽性不足；固定静态触发器容易被检测，且干净的微调会削弱触发器-目标关联。
AI.method: 基于因果验证发现情绪在LLM表示空间中可与语义解耦，提出寄生情感风格动态后门攻击。通过情感风格量化和重写技术，将含情感触发器的样本混入干净数据进行模型微调。
AI.result: 在指令 follow 生成和分类任务上的实验表明，Paraesthesia在四种不同模型上实现了约99%的攻击成功率，同时保持了模型的正常效用。
AI.conclusion: 情感因素作为动态触发器能够有效规避现有防御机制，相比静态词级触发器具有更高的隐蔽性和鲁棒性，为LLM安全研究提供了新的攻击视角。

title: Diabetic Retinopathy Classification using Downscaling Algorithms and Deep Learning
summary: Diabetic Retinopathy (DR) is an art and science of recording and classifying the retinal images of a diabetic patient. DR classification deals with classifying retinal fundus image into five stages on the basis of severity of diabetes. One of the major issue faced while dealing with DR classification problem is the large and varying size of images. In this paper we propose and explore the use of several downscaling algorithms before feeding the image data to a Deep Learning Network for classification. For improving training and testing; we amalgamate two datasets: Kaggle and Indian Diabetic Retinopathy Image Dataset. Our experiments have been performed on a novel Multi Channel Inception V3 architecture with a unique self crafted preprocessing phase. We report results of proposed approach using accuracy, specificity and sensitivity, which outperform the previous state of the art methods. Index Terms: Diabetic Retinopathy, Downscaling Algorithms, Multichannel CNN Architecture, Deep Learning

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种结合多种降尺度算法的多通道Inception V3架构，通过融合Kaggle和IDRIS数据集，在糖尿病视网膜病变分类任务上超越了现有最先进方法。
AI.motivation: 糖尿病视网膜病变分类面临的主要挑战是图像尺寸大且变化不一。为了解决这一问题并提高分类效果，研究者探索了在深度学习网络处理前对图像进行降尺度处理的有效性。
AI.method: 论文采用创新的多通道Inception V3架构，结合独特的预处理阶段和多种降尺度算法。通过合并Kaggle和印度糖尿病视网膜病变图像数据集（IDRIS）来增强训练和测试效果，使用准确率、特异性和敏感性指标评估性能。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提出的方法在准确率、特异性和敏感性方面均优于之前的最先进方法，证明了降尺度算法和多通道架构的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了在深度学习框架中结合降尺度预处理和多通道架构能够显著提升糖尿病视网膜病变分类的性能，为医学图像分析提供了新的解决方案。

title: OmniThoughtVis: A Scalable Distillation Pipeline for Deployable Multimodal Reasoning Models
summary: Recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have shown strong chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning ability on vision-language tasks, but their direct deployment in real-world systems is often limited by latency and resource constraints. In practice, smaller MLLMs are preferred for online serving, yet their reasoning performance is bottlenecked by the lack of large-scale, high-quality multimodal CoT supervision. In this paper, we present OmniThoughtVis, a scalable data curation and distillation pipeline for transferring multimodal reasoning capabilities from high-capacity teacher models to smaller, deployment-oriented MLLMs. Starting from a diverse open-source seed pool, our pipeline generates structured CoT traces and performs joint annotation of reasoning difficulty, answer quality, and semantic task tags. To maintain data quality at scale, we combine rule-based filtering, difficulty-aware selection, and tag-based diversity sampling, resulting in a curated corpus of 1.8M samples that supports controllable subset construction for downstream training. We use OmniThoughtVis to distill Qwen3-VL models from 2B to 8B parameters and evaluate them on nine multimodal reasoning benchmarks. The resulting distilled models show consistent gains across model scales, including improvements of up to +16.8 points on MathVerse and +5.6 points on MMMU-Pro for the 4B model. Notably, the distilled 4B model matches or surpasses the undistilled 8B baseline on several tasks, highlighting the practical value of scalable reasoning distillation for deployment-oriented MLLMs.

AI.tldr: OmniThoughtVis是一个可扩展的多模态数据整理与蒸馏框架，通过生成高质量的结构化思维链数据，将大型教师模型的多模态推理能力有效转移给小型模型，显著提升了小规模MLLM的推理性能。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型虽然在推理任务上表现出色，但由于延迟和资源限制无法直接部署；而小型MLLM虽适合部署，但缺乏大规模高质量的多模态思维链监督数据，推理性能受限。
AI.method: 提出OmniThoughtVis数据整理与蒸馏管道，从开源种子池开始生成结构化CoT轨迹，联合标注推理难度、答案质量和语义任务标签，结合规则过滤、难度感知选择和标签多样性采样，构建180万样本的高质量语料库。
AI.result: 使用该框架蒸馏Qwen3-VL模型(2B-8B参数)，蒸馏后模型在9个多模态推理基准上性能持续提升，其中4B模型在MathVerse上提升16.8分，在MMMU-Pro上提升5.6分，甚至在多个任务上超越未蒸馏的8B基线模型。
AI.conclusion: OmniThoughtVis证明了可扩展推理蒸馏对于面向部署的多模态大语言模型的实用价值，为解决模型规模与部署效率之间的矛盾提供了有效方案。

title: ZeroIDIR: Zero-Reference Illumination Degradation Image Restoration with Perturbed Consistency Diffusion Models
summary: In this paper, we propose a zero-reference diffusion-based framework, named ZeroIDIR, for illumination degradation image restoration, which decouples the restoration process into adaptive illumination correction and diffusion-based reconstruction while being trained solely on low-quality degraded images. Specifically, we design an adaptive gamma correction module that performs spatially varying exposure correction to generate illumination-corrected only representations to mitigate exposure bias and serve as reliable inputs for subsequent diffusion processes, where a histogram-guided illumination correction loss is introduced to regularize the corrected illumination distribution toward that of natural scenes. Subsequently, the illumination-corrected image is treated as an intermediate noisy state for the proposed perturbed consistency diffusion model to reconstruct details and suppress noise. Moreover, a perturbed diffusion consistency loss is proposed to constrain the forward diffusion trajectory of the final restored image to remain consistent with the perturbed state, thus improving restoration fidelity and stability in the absence of supervision. Extensive experiments on publicly available benchmarks show that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art unsupervised competitors and is comparable to supervised methods while being more generalizable to various scenes. Code is available at https://github.com/JianghaiSCU/ZeroIDIR.

AI.tldr: ZeroIDIR是一个零参考的扩散框架，通过分解光照校正和扩散重建过程，仅使用低质量退化图像即可实现光照退化图像的修复，性能优于无监督方法，可与有监督方法媲美。
AI.motivation: 现有的图像光照修复方法通常需要成对的高质量-低质量训练数据，限制了其在现实场景中的应用。同时，单一阶段的修复方法难以有效处理光照偏差和细节重建的耦合问题。
AI.method: 提出一个两阶段框架：1) 自适应伽马校正模块进行空间变化的光照校正，通过直方图引导的光照校正损失约束光照分布；2) 扰动一致性扩散模型将校正后的图像作为中间噪声状态进行细节重建，并提出扰动扩散一致性损失确保重建的稳定性和保真度。
AI.result: 在公共基准测试中，ZeroIDIR在无监督方法中达到最优性能，与有监督方法相当，且对各种场景具有更好的泛化能力。无需成对训练数据即可实现高质量的光照退化图像修复。
AI.conclusion: 该工作通过解耦光照校正和细节重建，结合扩散模型和自适应校正策略，为无监督光照退化图像修复提供了有效解决方案，具有实用价值和应用前景。

title: Enhancing Multilingual Counterfactual Generation through Alignment-as-Preference Optimization
summary: Self-generated counterfactual explanations (SCEs) are minimally modified inputs (minimality) generated by large language models (LLMs) that flip their own predictions (validity), offering a causally grounded approach to unraveling black-box LLM behavior. Yet extending them beyond English remains challenging: existing methods struggle to produce valid SCEs in non-dominant languages, and a persistent trade-off between validity and minimality undermines explanation quality. We introduce Macro, a preference alignment framework that applies Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) to multilingual SCE generation, using a composite scoring function to construct preference pairs that effectively translate the trade-off into measurable preference signals. Experiments across four LLMs and seven typologically diverse languages show that Macro improves validity by 12.55\% on average over the chain-of-thought baseline without degrading minimality, while avoiding the severe minimality violations of the translation-based baseline. Compared to supervised fine-tuning, Macro achieves superior performance on both metrics, confirming that explicit preference optimization is essential for balancing this trade-off. Further analyses reveal that Macro increases cross-lingual perturbation alignment and mitigates common generation errors. Our results highlight preference optimization as a promising direction for enhancing multilingual model explanations.

AI.tldr: Macro是一个利用直接偏好优化(DPO)的多语言自生成反事实解释框架，通过复合评分函数构建偏好对，有效解决了现有方法在非英语语言中无法生成有效解释以及在有效性和最小性之间的权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的自生成反事实解释(SCEs)方法存在两个主要挑战：1）在非主导语言中难以生成有效的SCEs；2）有效性和最小性之间存在持续的权衡，影响解释质量。这限制了多语言大模型行为解释的应用。
AI.method: 提出Macro框架，采用直接偏好优化(DPO)方法，设计复合评分函数来构建偏好对，将有效性与最小性之间的权衡转化为可测量的偏好信号，从而优化多语言SCE的生成。
AI.result: 在4个大模型和7种不同类型语言上，Macro有效提升了12.55%的有效性，同时保持了最小性；相比翻译基线避免了严重的最小性破坏；相比监督微调在两个指标上都取得更优表现。
AI.conclusion: 偏好优化是增强多语言模型解释的有前途方向，Macro通过显式偏好优化成功平衡了有效性与最小性的权衡，提高了跨语言扰动一致性并减少了常见生成错误。

title: Beyond Masks: The Case for Medical Image Parsing
summary: Medical imaging research has spent a decade getting very good at one thing: producing per-voxel masks. Masks tell us size, volume, and location, and a decade of clinical infrastructure rests on those outputs. Yet the report a radiologist writes contains almost nothing a mask can express. We argue that medical imaging research should adopt medical image parsing as its central output: a structured representation in which entities, attributes, and relationships are emitted together and mutually consistent. Entities are the named structures and findings, present or absent. Attributes describe those entities, capturing things like margin regularity, enhancement pattern, or severity grade. Relationships connect them, naming where one structure sits relative to another, what abuts what, and what has changed since the prior scan. A good parse satisfies three properties, in order: (1) decision (the parse names the right things in the current image), (2) reconstruction (its content is rich enough to regenerate that image), and (3) prediction (its content is rich enough to forecast how the patient state will evolve). Quantitative measurements are derived from this content; they are not predicted alongside it. To test how close the field is to producing such an output, we audit eleven representative systems against the three parsing primitives plus closure. None emits a well-formed parse. Entities are largely solved. Attributes, relationships, and closure remain near-empty. The path forward is not a new architecture. It is a commitment to a richer output, and to training signals that reward it. Segmentation taught models to measure. Parsing asks them to explain.

AI.tldr: 医学影像研究应从单一的体素掩码转向医学图像解析，输出包含实体、属性和关系的结构化表示，以满足决策、重建和预测三个核心要求。当前系统在实体识别上较为成熟，但在属性、关系的完整表达上仍存在重大不足。
AI.motivation: 当前医学影像研究过度依赖体素掩码输出，但放射科医师的报告内容却远超掩码能表达的信息。研究需要更贴近临床实际需求的输出方式，以提供更丰富、更结构化的医学影像信息。
AI.method: 提出医学图像解析框架，包含三个核心要素：实体（命名结构和发现）、属性（描述实体特征）、关系（连接实体间的空间和时间关系）。定义了解析质量的评判标准：决策能力、重建能力和预测能力。对11个代表性系统进行审计评估。
AI.result: 审计显示，现有系统在实体识别方面表现较好，但在属性提取、关系建模和完整性方面几乎为空。没有系统能够产生格式良好的完整解析结果。
AI.conclusion: 解决问题的关键不在于新架构，而在于承诺更丰富的输出格式和相应的训练信号。分割教会模型测量，而解析要求模型解释。研究重心应从单纯的分割转向全面的医学图像理解。

title: Human-Grounded Multimodal Benchmark with 900K-Scale Aggregated Student Response Distributions from Japan's National Assessment of Academic Ability
summary: Authentic school examinations provide a high-validity test bed for evaluating multimodal large language models (MLLMs), yet benchmarks grounded in Japanese K-12 assessments remain scarce. We present a multimodal dataset constructed from Japan's National Assessment of Academic Ability, comprising officially released middle-school items in Science, Mathematics, and Japanese Language. Unlike existing benchmarks based on synthetic or curated data, our dataset preserves real exam layouts, diagrams, and Japanese educational text, together with nationwide aggregated student response distributions (N $\approx$ 900{,}000). These features enable direct comparison between human and model performance under a unified evaluation framework. We benchmark recent multimodal LLMs using exact-match accuracy and character-level F1 for open-ended responses, observing substantial variation across subjects and strong sensitivity to visual reasoning demands. Human evaluation and LLM-as-judge analyses further assess the reliability of automatic scoring. Our dataset establishes a reproducible, human-grounded benchmark for multimodal educational reasoning and supports future research on evaluation, feedback generation, and explainable AI in authentic assessment contexts. Our dataset is available at: https://github.com/KyosukeTakami/gakucho-benchmark

AI.tldr: 本研究基于日本中小学学术能力评估构建了一个多模态数据集，为评估多模态大模型在真实教育场景中的表现提供了新的基准。
AI.motivation: 真实学校考试为评估多模态大语言模型提供了高有效性的测试平台，但基于日本K-12教育评估的基准仍然稀缺，现有基准多基于合成或精选数据，无法真实反映教育场景。
AI.method: 从日本全国学术能力评估中构建多模态数据集，包含科学、数学和日语的中考题目，保留真实考试版式、图表和日本教育文本，并包含全国学生答题分布数据；使用精确匹配准确率和字符级F1分数对开放性回答进行评估。
AI.result: 研究发现不同学科间模型表现差异显著，对视觉推理需求高度敏感；人工评估和LLM作为评判者的分析进一步验证了自动评分的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为多模态教育推理建立了可重现的、基于人类标准的基准，支持未来在教育评估、反馈生成和可解释AI方面的研究。

title: Instruct-ICL: Instruction-Guided In-Context Learning for Post-Disaster Damage Assessment
comment: Accepted by the 2026 IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium (IGARSS 2026)
summary: Rapid and accurate situational awareness is essential for effective response during natural disasters, where delays in analysis can significantly hinder decision-making. Training task-specific models for post-disaster assessment is often time-consuming and computationally expensive, making such approaches impractical in time-critical scenarios. Consequently, pretrained multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have emerged as a promising alternative for post-disaster visual question answering (VQA), a task that aims to answer structured questions about visual scenes by jointly reasoning over images and text. While these models demonstrate strong multimodal reasoning capabilities, their responses can be sensitive to prompt formulation, which can limit their reliability in real-world disaster assessment scenarios. In this paper, we investigate whether structured reasoning strategies can improve the reliability of pretrained MLLMs for post-disaster VQA. Specifically, we explore multiple prompting paradigms in which one MLLM is used to generate task-specific instructions that serve as Chain-of-Thought (CoT) guidance for a second MLLM. These instructions are incorporated during answer generation with varying degrees of in-context learning (ICL), enabling the model to leverage both explicit reasoning guidance and contextual examples. We conduct our evaluation on the FloodNet dataset and compare these approaches against a zero-shot baseline. Our results demonstrate that integrating instruction-driven CoT reasoning consistently improves answer accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本研究探索了使用结构化推理策略提高预训练多模态大语言模型在灾后视觉问答任务中的可靠性，通过指令驱动的思维链方法显著提升了回答准确性。
AI.motivation: 自然灾害应急响应中，快速准确的情况感知至关重要，但传统训练特定模型的方法耗时且计算昂贵。预训练MLLMs虽然展示了强大能力，但其对提示词表述的敏感性限制了在真实灾后评估场景中的可靠性。
AI.method: 提出了多层次的提示范例，使用第一个MLLM生成特定任务的指令作为第二个MLLM的思维链指导，结合不同程度的上下文学习，使模型能够同时利用显式推理指导和上下文示例。
AI.result: 在FloodNet数据集上的评估表明，集成指令驱动的思维链推理方法相比零基线始终能够提高回答准确性。
AI.conclusion: 结构化推理策略特别是指令驱动的思维链方法能够有效提升预训练MLLMs在灾后视觉问答任务中的表现和可靠性，为时间关键的灾害评估提供了实用解决方案。

title: Robust LLM Unlearning Against Relearning Attacks: The Minor Components in Representations Matter
summary: Large language model (LLM) unlearning aims to remove specific data influences from pre-trained model without costly retraining, addressing privacy, copyright, and safety concerns. However, recent studies reveal a critical vulnerability: unlearned models rapidly recover "forgotten" knowledge through relearning attacks. This fragility raises serious security concerns, especially for open-weight models. In this work, we investigate the fundamental mechanism underlying this fragility from a representation geometry perspective. We discover that existing unlearning methods predominantly optimize along dominant components, leaving minor components largely unchanged. Critically, during relearning attacks, the modifications in these dominant components are easily reversed, enabling rapid knowledge recovery, whereas minor components exhibit stronger resistance to such reversal. We further provide a theoretical analysis that explains both observations from the spectral structure of representations. Building on this insight, we propose Minor Component Unlearning (MCU), a novel unlearning approach that explicitly targets minor components in representations. By concentrating unlearning effects in these inherently robust directions, our method achieves substantially improved resistance to relearning attacks. Extensive experiments on three datasets validate our approach, demonstrating significant improvements over state-of-the-art methods including sharpness-aware minimization.

AI.tldr: 该论文从表征几何角度分析了大模型遗忘机制的脆弱性，发现主导成分容易被逆向恢复，而次要成分更具抵抗性，并据此提出了针对次要成分的遗忘方法MCU，显著提升了抗再学习攻击能力。
AI.motivation: 大规模语言模型遗忘旨在消除预训练模型中的特定数据影响，以满足隐私、版权和安全需求，但现有方法存在严重缺陷：遗忘后的模型容易通过再学习攻击快速恢复被遗忘的知识，这对开放权重的模型构成重大安全威胁。
AI.method: 从表征几何角度出发，研究发现现有遗忘方法主要沿主导成分优化，而次要成分基本不变。通过理论分析解释了这一现象的光谱结构特征，基于此提出了Minor Component Unlearning (MCU)方法，专门针对表征中的次要成分进行遗忘操作。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上的广泛实验表明，MCU方法显著提高了对再学习攻击的抵抗能力，效果优于包括锐度感知最小化在内的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了遗忘脆弱性的根本机制，通过利用次要成分的内在鲁棒性，为开发更安全可靠的模型遗忘技术提供了新的理论依据和实践方法。

title: Leveraging Multimodal Large Language Models for All-in-One Image Restoration via a Mixture of Frequency Experts
summary: All-in-one image restoration seeks to recover clean images from inputs affected by diverse and unknown degradations using a unified framework. Recent methods have shown strong performance by identifying degradation characteristics to guide the restoration process. However, many of them treat degradations as discrete categories, which limits their ability to model the continuous relational structure that arises in composite degradations. To address this issue, we propose a multimodal large language model (MLLM)-guided image restoration framework that exploits multimodal embeddings as guidance for low-level restoration. Specifically, MLLM-derived features are injected into an encoder-decoder architecture through an MLLM-guided fusion block (MGFB) to enhance degradation-aware representations. In addition, we incorporate a mixture-of-frequency-experts (MoFE) module that adaptively combines frequency experts using MLLM-guided contextual cues. To further improve expert routing, we design an MLLM-guided router with a relational alignment loss that encourages routing patterns consistent with the embedding-space relationships of degraded inputs. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks show that the proposed method achieves strong performance across diverse restoration settings and establishes a new state of the art on the challenging CDD11 dataset, outperforming previous methods by up to 1.35 dB.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种由多模态大语言模型(MLLM)指导的一体化图像恢复框架，通过多模态嵌入指导和混合频率专家模块，有效处理复合退化关系，在CDD11数据集上达到最新水平。
AI.motivation: 现有的一体化图像恢复方法将退化视为离散类别，难以建模复合退化中出现的连续关系结构，限制了其性能。
AI.method: 构建MLLM指导的图像恢复框架，包括：1) MLLM指导的融合块(MGFB)将MLLM特征注入编解码器架构；2) 混合频率专家(MoFE)模块自适应组合频率专家；3) MLLM指导的路由器设计关系对齐损失以优化专家路由。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中表现优异，在具有挑战性的CDD11数据集上建立新的最先进水平，相比之前方法提升高达1.35 dB。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功利用MLLM的多模态理解能力指导低层视觉恢复任务，有效处理连续退化关系，为一体化图像恢复提供了新的解决思路。

title: Learning to Foresee: Unveiling the Unlocking Efficiency of On-Policy Distillation
summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) has emerged as an efficient post-training paradigm for large language models. However, existing studies largely attribute this advantage to denser and more stable supervision, while the parameter-level mechanisms underlying OPD's efficiency remain poorly understood. In this work, we argue that OPD's efficiency stems from a form of ``foresight'': it establishes a stable update trajectory toward the final model early in training. This foresight manifests in two aspects. First, at the \textbf{Module-Allocation Level}, OPD identifies regions with low marginal utility and concentrates updates on modules that are more critical to reasoning. Second, at the \textbf{Update-Direction Level}, OPD exhibits stronger low-rank concentration, with its dominant subspaces aligning closely with the final update subspace early in training. Building on these findings, we propose \textbf{EffOPD}, a plug-and-play acceleration method that speeds up OPD by adaptively selecting an extrapolation step size and moving along the current update direction. EffOPD requires no additional trainable modules or complex hyperparameter tuning, and achieves an average training acceleration of $3\times$ while maintaining comparable final performance. Overall, our findings provide a parameter-dynamics perspective for understanding the efficiency of OPD and offer practical insights for designing more efficient post-training methods for large language models.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了在线策略蒸馏(OPD)效率的本质机制在于'预见性'，并提出基于此的EffOPD加速方法实现3倍训练加速。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要将OPD的效率归因于更密集稳定的监督，但其参数级机制缺乏深入理解，阻碍了更高效训练方法的设计。
AI.method: 通过分析OPD训练过程中的参数动态，发现其在模块分配层面和更新方向层面都表现出预见性，并基于此提出EffOPD方法，通过自适应选择外推步长沿当前更新方向加速训练。
AI.result: EffOPD无需额外可训练模块或复杂超参调优，在保持最终性能相当的情况下，平均实现3倍训练加速，验证了预见性机制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 从参数动力学视角揭示了OPD效率的内在机制，为设计更高效的大语言模型后训练方法提供了理论依据和实践指导。

title: SpatialForge: Bootstrapping 3D-Aware Spatial Reasoning from Open-World 2D Images
summary: Recent advancements in Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated exceptional semantic understanding, yet these models consistently struggle with spatial reasoning, often failing at fundamental geometric tasks such as depth ordering and precise coordinate grounding. Recent efforts introduce spatial supervision from scene-centric datasets (e.g., multi-view scans or indoor video), but are constrained by the limited number of underlying scenes. As a result, the scale and diversity of such data remain significantly smaller than those of web-scale 2D image collections. To address this limitation, we propose SpatialForge, a scalable data synthesis pipeline that transforms in-the-wild 2D images into spatial reasoning supervision. Our approach decomposes spatial reasoning into perception and relation, and constructs structured supervision signals covering depth, layout, and viewpoint-dependent reasoning, with automatic verification to ensure data quality. Based on this pipeline, we build SpatialForge-10M, a large-scale dataset containing 10 million spatial QA pairs. Extensive experiments across multiple spatial reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that training on SpatialForge-10M significantly improves the spatial reasoning ability of standard VLMs, highlighting the effectiveness of scaling 2D data for 3D-aware spatial reasoning.

AI.tldr: SpatialForge提出了一种可扩展的数据合成管道，将大规模2D网络图像转换为空间推理监督数据，构建了1000万个QA对，显著提升了VLM的空间推理能力。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型(VLMs)在语义理解方面表现出色，但在空间推理方面存在困难，特别是在深度排序和精确坐标定位等基础几何任务上。现有的空间监督方法受限于场景数量，数据规模和多样性远小于大规模2D图像集合。
AI.method: 将空间推理分解为感知和关系两个部分，构建覆盖深度、布局和视点相关推理的结构化监督信号，并采用自动验证确保数据质量。基于此管道开发了SpatialForge-10M数据集。
AI.result: 在多个空间推理基准测试上的广泛实验表明，使用SpatialForge-10M训练显著提高了标准VLM的空间推理能力，证明了扩展2D数据用于3D感知空间推理的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SpatialForge通过将大规模2D网络图像转换为空间推理监督数据，为提升VLM的空间能力提供了有效途径，展示了用2D数据解决3D空间推理问题的潜力。

title: Training-Inference Consistent Segmented Execution for Long-Context LLMs
comment: Accepted by ICML 2026. 19 pages, 6 figures, 3 tables
summary: Transformer-based large language models face severe scalability challenges in long-context generation due to the computational and memory costs of full-context attention. Under practical computation and memory constraints, many inference-efficient long-context methods improve efficiency by adopting bounded-context or segment-level execution only during inference, while continuing to train models under full-context attention, resulting in a mismatch between training and inference execution and state-transition semantics. Based on this insight, we propose a training-inference consistent segment-level generation framework, in which training and inference follow the same segment-level forward execution semantics. During training, consistency with inference is enforced by restricting gradient propagation to KV states carried over from the immediately preceding segment, while permitting head-specific access to past KV states during the forward pass without involving them in gradient propagation. Across long-context benchmarks, our approach achieves performance comparable to full-context attention, while achieving competitive latency-memory trade-offs against strong inference-efficient baselines, and substantially improving scalability at very long context lengths (e.g., approximately 6x lower peak prefill memory at 128K compared to full-context attention with FlashAttention).

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种训练-推理一致的分段级生成框架，通过在训练时采用与推理相同的分段前向执行语义，解决了现有高效长上下文方法中训练与推理不匹配的问题，在保持与全注意力相当性能的同时，显著降低了计算和内存开销。
AI.motivation: 基于Transformer的大语言模型在长上下文生成中面临严峻的可扩展性挑战。现有的推理高效方法通过在推理时采用有界上下文或分段级执行来提高效率，但在训练时仍使用全注意力机制，导致训练与推理之间的执行和状态转移语义不匹配。
AI.method: 提出了训练-推理一致的分段级生成框架。在训练期间，通过将梯度传播限制在来自紧邻前一段的KV状态来强制与推理的语义一致性，同时在前向传播中允许每头特定的过去KV状态访问而不参与梯度传播。
AI.result: 在长上下文基准测试中，该方法实现了与全注意力机制相当的性能，同时与强大的推理高效基线相比具有竞争力的延迟-内存权衡，并在极长上下文长度下显著提高了可扩展性（如在128K上下文中相比带FlashAttention的全注意力降低约6倍的峰值预填充内存）。
AI.conclusion: 通过统一训练和推理的执行语义，本文方法有效解决了现有长上下文优化技术中的训练-推理不匹配问题，为实际应用中的长上下文处理提供了高效且性能稳定的解决方案。

title: Encore: Conditioning Trajectory Forecasting via Biased Ego Rehearsals
summary: Learning and representing the subjectivities of agents has become a challenging but crucial problem in the trajectory prediction task. Such subjectivities not only present specific spatial or temporal structures, but also are anisotropic for all interaction participants. Despite great efforts, it remains difficult to explicitly learn and forecast these subjectivities, let alone further modulate models' predictions through a specific ego's subjectivity. Inspired by prefactual thoughts in psychology and relevant theatrical concepts, we interpret such subjectivities in future trajectories as the continuous process from rehearsal to encore. In the rehearsal phase, the proposed ego predictor focuses on how each ego agent learns to derive and direct a set of explicitly biased rehearsal trajectories for all participants in the scene from the short-term observations. Then, these rehearsal trajectories serve as immediate controls to condition final predictions, providing direct yet distinct ego biases for the prediction network to simulate agents' various subjectivities. Experiments across datasets not only demonstrate a consistent improvement in the performance of the proposed \emph{Encore} trajectory prediction model but also provide clear interpretability regarding subjectivities as biased ego rehearsals.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种名为 Encore 的轨迹预测模型，通过模拟人格化的"排练到返场"过程来显式学习和预测智能体的主观性，从而提升预测性能。
AI.motivation: 在轨迹预测任务中，学习和表征智能体的主观性是一个关键挑战。这些主观性不仅具有特定的时空结构，而且对不同交互参与者来说是各向异性的。现有方法难以显式学习和预测这些主观性，更难通过特定自我的主观性来调节模型的预测结果。
AI.method: 受心理学前事实思维和戏剧概念的启发，该方法将未来轨迹中的主观性解释为从排练到返场的连续过程。在排练阶段，提出的自我预测器专注于学习如何从短期观测中为场景中的所有参与者推导和引导一组显式偏置的排练轨迹。这些排练轨迹作为即时控制条件来 Conditioning 最终预测。
AI.result: 实验证明了提出的 Encore 轨迹预测模型在不同数据集上都能提高性能，同时为主观性作为偏置的自我排练提供了清晰的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 通过将智能体的主观性建模为排练到返场的过程，该方法成功实现了主观性的显式建模和预测，为轨迹预测任务提供了一种新颖且可解释的解决方案。

title: Safety-Oriented Evaluation of Language Understanding Systems for Air Traffic Control
summary: Air Traffic Control (ATC) is a safety-critical domain in which incorrect interpretation of instructions may lead to severe operational consequences. While large language models (LLMs) demonstrate strong general performance, their reliability in operational ATC environments remains unclear. Existing evaluation approaches, largely based on aggregate metrics such as F1 or macro accuracy, treat all errors uniformly and fail to account for the asymmetric consequences of high-risk semantic mistakes (e.g., incorrect runway identifiers or movement constraints). To address this gap, we propose a safety-oriented, consequence-aware evaluation framework tailored to ATC operations. Our results reveal that while current LLMs achieve reasonable aggregate accuracy, their operational reliability is severely limited. Evaluated on clean transcripts, the peak Risk Score reaches only 0.69, with most models scoring below 0.6 despite high macro-F1 performance. Further analysis shows that errors concentrate in high-impact entities despite relatively stable action-type classification, indicating structural grounding deficiencies. These findings highlight the necessity of consequence-aware evaluation protocols for the responsible deployment of AI-assisted ATC systems.

AI.tldr: 研究提出了安全导向、后果感知的评估框架来评估LLM在空中交通管制中的可靠性，发现尽管常规指标表现良好，但实际运行可靠性严重受限。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM评估方法无法反映空中交通管制领域中高风险语义错误的非对称后果，需要开发专门的安全评估框架来确保AI辅助系统的可靠部署。
AI.method: 构建针对ATC操作的后果感知评估框架，重点关注高风险语义错误（如错误的跑道标识或移动限制），超越传统的F1或宏准确率等聚合指标。
AI.result: LLM在清洁转录本上最高风险评分仅0.69，多数模型低于0.6，尽管宏F1表现较高。错误集中在高影响实体上，动作类型分类相对稳定，表明存在结构性基础缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果强调了后果感知评估协议对负责任部署AI辅助ATC系统的必要性，揭示了当前LLM在高风险操作环境中的可靠性局限性。

title: Deep Probabilistic Unfolding for Quantized Compressive Sensing
summary: We propose a deep probabilistic unfolding model to address the classical quantized compressive sensing problem that leverages an unfolding framework to enhance the reconstruction accuracy and efficiency. Unlike previous unfolding methods that apply L2 projection to measurements, we derive a closed-form, numerically stable likelihood gradient projection, which allows the model to respect the true quantization physics, turning the hard quantization constraint into a soft probabilistic guidance. Furthermore, an efficient, dual-domain Mamba module is specifically designed to dynamically capture and fuse the multi-scale local and global features, ensuring the interactions between the distant but correlated regions. Extensive experiments demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance of the proposed method over previous works, which is capable of promoting the application of quantized compressive sensing in real life.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种深度概率展开模型，通过结合物理感知的梯度投影和双域Mamba模块，在量化压缩感知问题中实现了最先进的重建性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于展开的量化压缩感知方法使用L2投影处理测量值，无法准确反映量化过程的物理特性，限制了重建精度和实际应用。
AI.method: 1) 推导出闭合形式的数值稳定似然梯度投影，将硬量化约束转化为软概率引导；2) 设计高效的双域Mamba模块，动态捕获和融合多尺度局部与全局特征，实现远距离相关区域的交互；3) 基于展开框架构建深度概率模型。
AI.result: 在大量实验中，该方法在重建准确性和效率方面均超越了现有工作，展现出最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的深度概率展开模型通过物理感知的投影机制和特征融合设计，有效提升了量化压缩感知的重建质量，为其实际应用奠定了基础。

title: From Token to Token Pair: Efficient Prompt Compression for Large Language Models in Clinical Prediction
summary: By processing electronic health records (EHRs) as natural language sequences, large language models (LLMs) have shown potential in clinical prediction tasks such as mortality prediction and phenotyping. However, longitudinal or highly frequent EHRs often yield excessively long token sequences that result in high computational costs and even reduced performance. Existing solutions either add modules for compression or remove less important tokens, which introduce additional inference latency or risk losing clinical information. To achieve lossless compression of token sequences without additional cost or loss of performance, we propose Medical Token-Pair Encoding (MedTPE), a layered method that extends standard tokenisation for EHR sequences. MedTPE merges frequently co-occurring medical token pairs into composite tokens, providing lossless compression while preserving the computational complexity through a dependency-aware replacement strategy. Only the embeddings of the newly introduced tokens of merely 0.5-1.0% of the LLM's parameters are fine-tuned via self-supervised learning. Experiments on real-world datasets for two clinical scenarios demonstrate that MedTPE reduces input token length by up to 31% and inference latency by 34-63%, while maintaining or even improving both predictive performance and output format compliance across multiple LLMs and four clinical prediction tasks. Furthermore, MedTPE demonstrates robustness across different input context lengths and generalisability to scientific and financial domains and different languages.

AI.tldr: MedTPE是一种新颖的医疗标记对编码方法，通过合并频繁共同出现的医疗标记对，实现了对长序列电子健康记录的31%无损压缩，同时降低推理延迟34-63%且保持或提升预测性能。
AI.motivation: 电子健康记录作为自然语言序列时往往过长，导致计算成本高昂且性能下降。现有方案要么增加压缩模块引入额外延迟，要么删除标记丢失临床信息，亟需一种无需额外成本且无损的压缩方法。
AI.method: 提出分层的医疗标记对编码方法MedTPE，通过依赖感知替换策略将频繁共现的医疗标记对合并为复合标记，实现无损压缩；仅需微调新增标记的0.5-1.0%参数，通过自监督学习训练。
AI.result: 在真实临床数据集上，MedTPE减少输入标记长度31%，降低推理延迟34-63%，在多种LLM和四个临床预测任务上保持或提升预测性能及输出格式合规性，且在不同输入长度、多领域（科学、金融）和多语言中表现稳健。
AI.conclusion: MedTPE成功解决了长序列EHR处理的效率和性能问题，为临床预测任务提供了一种高效、无损且通用的解决方案，具有良好的跨领域和跨语言应用潜力。

title: LDDR: Linear-DPP-Based Dynamic-Resolution Frame Sampling for Video MLLMs
summary: Video understanding in multimodal large language models requires selecting informative frames from long, redundant videos under limited visual-token budgets. Existing methods often rely on uniform sampling, point-wise relevance scoring, chunk-wise selection, or agentic exploration, which either miss global dependencies or introduce substantial overhead. We propose LDDR (Linear DPP-Based Dynamic Resolution), a training-free, plug-and-play, and budget-aware video frame sampling framework. LDDR performs query-aware Determinantal Point Process (DPP) frame selection in a task-conditioned feature space, achieving a 3x runtime speedup over standard DPP baselines. It further introduces a Group DPP importance metric to guide frame retention and dynamic resolution allocation, assigning more tokens to informative, non-redundant frames while downscaling or pruning less useful ones. Across four video benchmarks spanning short-, medium-, and long-range videos, LDDR consistently outperforms the next-best baselines, achieving gains of 2.5 points under budget-constrained settings and 1.6 points in high-budget scenarios. These improvements are consistently observed across multiple MLLM backbones, including both open- and closed-source models. Qualitative analysis confirms that relevant frames are selected and allocated a higher budget, facilitating improved video understanding.

AI.tldr: LDDR是一个无需训练的视频帧采样框架，通过线性DPP算法和动态分辨率分配，在视觉标记预算有限的情况下显著提升视频理解性能。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态大语言模型在处理长视频时面临视觉标记预算限制，现有的均匀采样、相关性评分等方法要么忽略全局依赖关系，要么引入大量计算开销。
AI.method: 提出LDDR框架，首先在任务条件化特征空间中执行查询感知的DPP帧选择（比标准DPP快3倍），然后基于Group DPP重要性指标指导帧保留和动态分辨率分配，为信息丰富且非冗余的帧分配更多标记。
AI.result: 在四个涵盖短、中、长程视频的基准测试中，LDDR consistently优于次优基线，在预算受限条件下获得2.5分提升，在高预算场景下获得1.6分提升，改进在多个MLLM骨干网络上都得到验证。
AI.conclusion: LDDR作为一种训练免、即插即用的框架，有效解决了视频理解中的帧选择和预算分配问题，通过智能选择相关帧并合理分配计算资源，显著提升了多模态大语言模型的视频理解能力。

title: Choosing features for classifying multiword expressions
summary: Multiword expressions (MWEs) are a heterogeneous set with a glaring need for classifications. Designing a satisfactory classification involves choosing features. In the case of MWEs, many features are a priori available. Not all features are equal in terms of how reliably MWEs can be assigned to classes. Accordingly, resulting classifications may be more or less fruitful for computational use. I outline an enhanced classification. In order to increase its suitability for many languages, I use previous works taking into account various languages.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文提出了一种增强的多词表达式分类方法，通过评估不同特征的可靠性来提高分类效果，并考虑多语言适用性。
AI.motivation: 多词表达式(MWEs)是一个异构的集合，迫切需要有效的分类系统。现有的特征不是同等可靠的，这影响了分类的准确性和计算实用性。
AI.method: 作者首先分析了多个可用于MWE分类的a priori特征，评估它们作为分类依据的可靠性差异，然后结合多语言的研究成果，设计出一个增强的分类框架。
AI.result: 提出了一个更加适合多语言环境的增强分类体系，该体系基于特征可靠性评估，能够为MWE提供更有效的计算应用。
AI.conclusion: 通过选择和优化分类特征，并结合多语言研究经验，新提出的分类方法在计算应用方面更加实用，对处理异构的MWEs具有更好的效果。

title: A Mimetic Detector for Adversarial Image Perturbations
summary: Adversarial attacks fool deep image classifiers by adding tiny, almost invisible noise patterns to a clean image. The standard $\ell^\infty$-bounded attacks (FGSM, PGD, and the $\ell^\infty$ variant of Carlini--Wagner) produce high-frequency, near-random sign patterns at the pixel level: nearly invisible in $\ell^2$, but carrying disproportionate gradient energy. We exploit this with a single-shot, training-free detector using the high-order Corbino--Castillo mimetic operators from the open-source MOLE library. No retraining, no surrogate classifier, no access to the network under attack: the verdict is a property of the input alone, computed in $O(HW)$ time. We validate the detector on the standard \texttt{peppers} test image at the canonical $\ell^\infty$ budget $\varepsilon = 16/255$ and observe a clean-vs-adversarial separation that grows monotonically from $3.55\times$ at order $k=2$ to $4.19\times$ at $k=6$.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于高阶Corbino-Castillo拟态算子的单次、免训练对抗样本检测器，能够有效识别ℓ∞边界攻击生成的对抗样本，无需重新训练或访问目标网络。
AI.motivation: 标准ℓ∞边界攻击（如FGSM、PGD）会在像素级别产生高频、接近随机的符号模式，这些模式在ℓ2范数下几乎不可见，但携带了不成比例的梯度能量，作者利用这一特性来检测对抗样本。
AI.method: 使用来自开源MOLE库的高阶Corbino-Castillo拟态算子作为检测器，该方法只需计算输入图像本身的空间特性，计算复杂度为O(HW)，无需重新训练、无需代理分类器、无需访问被攻击的网络。
AI.result: 在标准peppers测试图像上，当ℓ∞预算为16/255时，检测器在k=2到k6的阶数范围内，清洁样本与对抗样本的分离度从3.55倍单调增长到4.19倍，表现出良好的检测效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法利用对抗攻击的高频噪声特性，实现了一种简单高效的检测方案，为对抗样本检测提供了新的思路，具有实际应用价值。

title: Probabilistic Calibration Is a Trainable Capability in Language Models
summary: Language models are increasingly used in settings where outputs must satisfy user-specified randomness constraints, yet their generation probabilities are often poorly calibrated to those targets. We study whether this capability can be improved directly through fine-tuning. Concretely, we fine-tune language models on synthetic prompts that require sampling from mathematical distributions, and compare two Calibration Fine-Tuning variants: a soft-target method that converts the desired output distribution into trie-derived next-token targets, and a hard-target method that trains on sampled completions from the same target distribution. Across 12 models spanning four families, both methods substantially improve structured-sampling fidelity on held-out distribution families and unseen parameter settings, showing that probabilistic calibration is a trainable capability. Under our selected training configurations, the two methods exhibit different empirical profiles: hard-target fine-tuning is often strongest on structured numeric sampling, while soft-target fine-tuning performs better on broader stochastic generation benchmarks, including open-ended random generation, multiple-choice answer-position balancing, and NoveltyBench. The gains sometimes reduce downstream capability, especially arithmetic reasoning, with costs varying by model. Overall, our results show that probabilistic calibration can be improved through fine-tuning, with our hard-target configuration favoring exact numeric fidelity and our soft-target configuration favoring broader stochastic transfer. Code is available at https://github.com/chandar-lab/calibration-finetuning.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过两种校准微调方法（软目标和硬目标）提升了语言模型满足用户指定随机性约束的能力，实验证明概率校准是一种可训练的能力。
AI.motivation: 语言模型在需要满足用户指定随机性约束的场景中使用时，其生成概率往往与目标分布校准不佳，本研究探索是否可以通过微调直接改进这一能力。
AI.method: 在需要从数学分布中采样的合成提示上微调语言模型，提出两种方法：软目标方法将所需输出分布转换为trie派生的下一个标记目标，硬目标方法则在来自目标分布的采样补全上进行训练。
AI.result: 两种方法在保持分布系列和未见参数设置的结构化采样保真度上都有显著提升，硬目标方法在结构化数值采样上表现最强，软目标方法在更广泛的随机生成基准上表现更好，但会带来一定的下游能力损失。
AI.conclusion: 概率校准可以通过微调得到改善，硬目标配置有利于精确数值保真度，软目标配置有利于更广泛的随机迁移，展示了校准能力在不同任务间的权衡关系。

title: STRIDE: Training-Free Diversity Guidance via PCA-Directed Feature Perturbation in Single-Step Diffusion Models
summary: Distilled one-step (T=1) or few-step (T$\leq$4) diffusion models enable real-time image generation but often exhibit reduced sample diversity compared to their multi-step counterparts. In multi-step diffusion, diversity can be introduced through schedules, trajectories, or iterative optimization; however, these mechanisms are unavailable in the few-step or single-step setting, limiting the effectiveness of existing diversity-enhancing methods. A natural alternative is to perturb intermediate features, but naive feature perturbation is often ineffective, either yielding limited diversity gains or degrading generation quality. We argue that effective diversity injection in few-step models requires perturbations that respect the model's learned feature geometry. Based on this insight, we propose STRIDE, a training-free and optimization-free method that operates in a single forward pass. STRIDE injects spatially coherent (pink) noise into intermediate transformer features, projected onto the principal components of the model's own activations, ensuring that perturbations lie on the learned feature manifold. This design enables controlled variation along meaningful directions in the representation space. Extensive experiments on FLUX.1-schnell and SD3.5 Turbo across COCO, DrawBench, PartiPrompts, and GenEval show that STRIDE consistently improves diversity while maintaining strong text alignment. In particular, STRIDE reduces intra-batch similarity with minimal impact on CLIP score, and Pareto-dominates existing training-free baselines on the diversity-fidelity frontier. These results highlight that, in the absence of iterative refinement, improving diversity in few-step and one-step diffusion depends not on increasing perturbation strength, but on aligning perturbations with the model's internal representation structure.

AI.tldr: STRIDE是一种无需训练和优化的方法，通过在模型自身激活的主成分上注入空间相干噪声，显著提升了单步或少步扩散模型生成样本的多样性，同时保持保真度。
AI.motivation: 单步或少步扩散模型虽然能实现实时图像生成，但相比多步模型样本多样性较差。传统的多样性增强机制（如调度、轨迹、迭代优化）在少步/单步设置下不可用，而朴素的特征扰动方法效果有限。
AI.method: 提出STRIDE方法，将空间相干（粉色）噪声投影到模型自身激活的主成分上，对中间Transformer特征进行扰动，确保扰动位于学习到的特征流形内，在表示空间中有意义方向上实现可控变化。
AI.result: 在FLUX.1-schnell和SD3.5 Turbo上，STRIDE在多个基准测试中持续提升多样性同时保持强文本对齐，在多样性-保真度前沿上Pareto主导现有基线。
AI.conclusion: 在缺乏迭代优化的情况下，提升少步和单步扩散模型多样性的关键不在于增加扰动强度，而在于使扰动与模型内部表示结构对齐。

title: Self-Distilled Trajectory-Aware Boltzmann Modeling: Bridging the Training-Inference Discrepancy in Diffusion Language Models
summary: Diffusion Language Models (DLMs) have recently emerged as a promising alternative to autoregressive language models, offering stronger global awareness and highly parallel generation. However, post-training DLMs with standard Negative Evidence Lower Bound (NELBO)-based supervised fine-tuning remains inefficient: training reconstructs randomly masked tokens in a single step, whereas inference follows a confidence-guided, multi-step easy-to-hard denoising trajectory. Recent trajectory-based self-distillation methods exploit such inference trajectories mainly for sampling-step compression and acceleration, often improving decoding efficiency without substantially enhancing the model's underlying capability, and may even degrade performance under full diffusion decoding. In this work, we ask whether self-distilled trajectories can be used not merely for faster inference, but for genuine knowledge acquisition. Although these trajectories lie on the pretrained DLM's own distributional manifold and thus offer a potentially lower optimization barrier, we find that naively fine-tuning on them with standard NELBO objectives yields only marginal gains. To address this limitation, we propose \textbf{T}rajectory-\textbf{A}ligned optimization via \textbf{Bo}ltzmann \textbf{M}odeling (\textbf{TABOM}), a self-distilled trajectory-based post-training framework that aligns training with the easy-to-hard structure of inference. TABOM models the inference unmasking preference as a Boltzmann distribution over predictive entropies and derives a tractable pairwise ranking objective to align the model's certainty ordering with the observed decoding trajectory. Empirically, TABOM achieves substantial gains in new domains, expands the effective knowledge boundary of DLMs, and significantly mitigates catastrophic forgetting compared with standard SFT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TABOM框架，通过自蒸馏轨迹对齐优化来提升扩散语言模型的后训练效果，实现了显著的知识获取和性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有基于NELBO的扩散语言模型监督微调存在训练与推理不匹配的问题：训练采用随机掩码单步重构，而推理是渐进式的多步骤去噪轨迹，导致训练效率低下和知识获取受限。
AI.method: 提出TABOM框架，将推理去噪偏好建模为基于预测熵的玻尔兹曼分布，推导配对排序目标函数来对齐模型确定性与解码轨迹，使训练与推理的由易到难结构保持一致。
AI.result: TABOM在新领域取得显著性能提升，扩展了DLM的有效知识边界，相比标准SFT大幅缓解了灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.conclusion: 证明了自蒸馏轨迹不仅能用于推理加速，更可用于真正的知识获取， trajectories-aligned优化为扩散语言模型的后训练提供了有效新思路。

title: PoseBridge: Bridging the Skeletonization Gap for Zero-Shot Skeleton-Based Action Recognition
summary: Zero-shot skeleton-based action recognition (ZSSAR) is typically treated as a skeleton-text alignment problem: encode joint-coordinate sequences, align them with language, and classify unseen actions. We argue that this alignment is often too late. Skeletons are not complete action observations, but compressed outputs of human pose estimation (HPE); by the time alignment begins, human-object interactions and pose-relative visual cues may no longer be explicit. We call this upstream semantic loss. To address it, we propose PoseBridge, an HPE-aware ZSSAR framework that bridges intermediate HPE representations to skeleton-text alignment. Rather than adding an RGB action branch or object detector, PoseBridge extracts pose-anchored semantic cues from the same HPE process that produces skeletons, then transfers them through skeleton-conditioned bridging and semantic prototype adaptation. Across NTU-RGB+D 60/120, PKU-MMD, and Kinetics-200/400, PoseBridge improves ZSSAR performance under the evaluated protocols. On the Kinetics-200/400 PURLS benchmark, which contains in-the-wild videos with diverse scenes and action contexts, PoseBridge shows the clearest separation, improving the strongest compared baseline by 13.3-17.4 points across all eight splits. Our code will be publicly released.

AI.tldr: PoseBridge是一种零样本骨架动作识别框架，通过在姿态估计过程中提取语义特征来解决上游语义损失问题
AI.motivation: 传统的骨架-文本对齐方法存在上游语义损失问题。骨架作为人体姿态估计的压缩输出，在对齐开始时已经丢失了人机交互和姿态相关的视觉线索，导致零样本动作识别性能受限。
AI.method: 提出PoseBridge框架，在同一个人体姿态估计过程中提取基于姿态锚定的语义线索，通过骨架条件桥接和语义原型自适应机制将这些语义特征传递给骨架-文本对齐过程，无需额外的RGB动作分支或目标检测器。
AI.result: 在NTU-RGB+D 60/120、PKU-MMD和Kinetics-200/400数据集上均提升了零样本骨架动作识别性能。特别是在Kinetics-200/400 PURLS基准上的表现最为突出，在全部八个分割上相比最强基线提升了13.3-17.4分。
AI.conclusion: 通过在姿态估计的中间阶段获取语义信息并有效传递给下游对齐任务，PoseBridge成功解决了上游语义损失问题，为零样本骨架动作识别提供了新的解决方案。

title: Concordance Comparison as a Means of Assembling Local Grammars
summary: Named Entity Recognition for person names is an important but non-trivial task in information extraction. This article uses a tool that compares the concordances obtained from two local grammars (LG) and highlights the differences. We used the results as an aid to select the best of a set of LGs. By analyzing the comparisons, we observed relationships of inclusion, intersection and disjunction within each pair of LGs, which helped us to assemble those that yielded the best results. This approach was used in a case study on extraction of person names from texts written in Portuguese. We applied the enhanced grammar to the Gold Collection of the Second HAREM. The F-Measure obtained was 76.86, representing a gain of 6 points in relation to the state-of-the-art for Portuguese.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种基于局部语法对比分析来优化命名实体识别的方法，成功将葡萄牙语人名识别的F值提升了6个百分点，达到76.86%。
AI.motivation: 人名识别在信息抽取中具有重要性但实现困难，葡萄牙语的人名识别效果有待提升，需要找到有效的方法来优化现有的语法规则。
AI.method: 通过开发对比工具分析两种局部语法的一致性差异，观察语法间的包含、交集和析取关系，利用这些关系指导选择和组合最优的语法规则集。
AI.result: 在HAREM黄金标准数据集上测试，优化后的语法使F值达到76.86%，相比当时葡萄牙语人名识别的先进水平提升了6个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 基于局部语法对比分析的方法能够有效优化命名实体识别性能，为语法规则的改进提供了系统性的指导思路，证明了该方法在实际应用中的可行性。

title: Principled Design of Diffusion-based Optimizers for Inverse Problems
summary: Score-based diffusion models achieve state-of-the-art performance for inverse problems, but their practical deployment is hindered by long inference times and cumbersome hyperparameter tuning. While pretrained diffusion models can be reused across tasks without retraining, inference-time hyperparameters such as the noise schedule and posterior sampling weights typically require ad-hoc adjustment for each problem setup. We propose principled reparameterizations that induce invariances, allowing the same hyperparameters to be reused across multiple problems without re-tuning. In addition, building on the RED-diff framework, which reformulates posterior sampling as an optimization problem, we further develop the OptDiff pipeline. OptDiff provides a simplified tuning framework that facilitates the integration of convex optimization tools to accelerate inference. Experiments on image reconstruction, deblurring, and super-resolution show substantial speedups and improved image quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了基于分数的扩散模型改进方法OptDiff，通过引入重参数化实现超参数跨任务不变性，并结合优化工具显著加速逆问题推理过程。
AI.motivation: 基于分数的扩散模型在逆问题上表现优异，但推理时间长且超参数调整繁琐。现有方法需要为每个问题单独调整噪声调度和后验采样权重等推理时超参数，这限制了模型的实际部署效率。
AI.method: 提出了两个关键创新：1）引入具有不变性的重参数化方法，使相同超参数可跨多个问题复用；2）基于RED-diff框架开发OptDiff流水线，将后验采样重构为优化问题，简化调优框架并集成凸优化工具。
AI.result: 在图像重建、去模糊和超分辨率任务上的实验表明，该方法实现了推理速度的大幅提升和图像质量的改善。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统性的重参数化和优化框架设计，OptDiff有效解决了扩散模型在逆问题应用中的推理效率和调优复杂性问题，为实际部署提供了实用解决方案。

title: Qwen-Scope: Turning Sparse Features into Development Tools for Large Language Models
summary: Large language models have achieved remarkable capabilities across diverse tasks, yet their internal decision-making processes remain largely opaque, limiting our ability to inspect, control, and systematically improve them. This opacity motivates a growing body of research in mechanistic interpretability, with sparse autoencoders (SAEs) emerging as one of the most promising tools for decomposing model activations into sparse, interpretable feature representations. We introduce Qwen-Scope, an open-source suite of SAEs built on the Qwen model family, comprising 14 groups of SAEs across 7 model variants from the Qwen3 and Qwen3.5 series, covering both dense and mixture-of-expert architectures. Built on top of these SAEs, we show that SAEs can go beyond post-hoc analysis to serve as practical interfaces for model development along four directions: (i) inference-time steering, where SAE feature directions control language, concepts, and preferences without modifying model weights; (ii) evaluation analysis, where activated SAE features provide a representation-level proxy for benchmark redundancy and capability coverage; (iii) data-centric workflows, where SAE features support multilingual toxicity classification and safety-oriented data synthesis; and (iv) post-training optimization, where SAE-derived signals are incorporated into supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning objectives to mitigate undesirable behaviors such as code-switching and repetition. Together, these results demonstrate that SAEs can serve not only as post-hoc analysis tools, but also as reusable representation-level interfaces for diagnosing, controlling, evaluating, and improving large language models. By open-sourcing Qwen-Scope, we aim to support mechanistic research and accelerate practical workflows that connect model internals to downstream behavior.

AI.tldr: Qwen-Scope是一个基于Qwen模型系列的开源稀疏自编码器套件，不仅用于模型分析，还可作为推理控制、评估分析、数据处理和后训练优化的实用接口。
