AI.motivation: 大语言模型的内部决策过程仍不透明，限制了模型的检查、控制和改进。稀疏自编码器作为有前景的工具，能够将模型激活分解为可解释的特征表示。
AI.method: 构建了包含14组SAEs的开源套件，覆盖Qwen3和Qwen3.5系列的7种模型变体，包括密集和专家混合架构。通过SAE特征方向实现推理控制，利用激活特征进行评估分析，支持多语言毒性分类和安全数据合成，并将SAE信号融入到微调和强化学习中。
AI.result: 成功展示了SAEs在四个方向的应用：推理时控制语言和偏好、评估基准冗余和能力覆盖、数据分类和合成、以及后训练优化中的行为修正。
AI.conclusion: SAEs不仅可作为事后分析工具，还能作为可重用的表示级接口，用于诊断、控制、评估和改进大语言模型，通过开源Qwen-Scope促进了机理研究和实际工作流程的发展。

title: LiBrA-Net: Lie-Algebraic Bilateral Affine Fields for Real-Time 4K Video Dehazing
summary: Currently, there is a gap in the field of ultra-high-definition (UHD) video dehazing due to the lack of a benchmark for evaluation. Furthermore, existing video dehazing methods cannot run on consumer-grade GPUs when processing continuous UHD sequences of 3--5 frames at a time. In this paper, we address both issues with a new benchmark and an efficient method. Our key observation is that atmospheric dehazing reduces to a per-pixel affine transform governed by the low-frequency depth field, which can be compactly encoded in bilateral grids whose prediction cost is decoupled from the output resolution. Building on this, we propose LiBrA-Net, which factorizes the spatiotemporal affine field into a spatial--color and a temporal bilateral sub-grid predicted at a fixed low resolution, fuses their coefficients in the $\mathfrak{gl}(3)$ Lie algebra under group-theoretic regularization, maps the result to invertible GL(3) transforms via a Cayley parameterization, and restores high-frequency detail through a lightweight input-guided branch. We further release UHV-4K, the first paired 4K video dehazing benchmark with depth, transmission, and optical-flow annotations on every frame. Across UHV-4K, REVIDE, and HazeWorld, LiBrA-Net sets a new state of the art among compared video dehazing methods while running native 4K at 25 FPS on a single GPU with only 6.12 M parameters. Code and data are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/LiBrA-Net-42B8.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文提出了LiBrA-Net网络和UHV-4K基准数据集，解决了超高清视频去雾领域缺乏评估基准和现有方法无法在消费级GPU实时运行的两大问题。
AI.motivation: 超高清视频去雾领域存在两大痛点：一是缺乏统一的评估基准，二是现有连续UHD视频去雾方法无法在消费级GPU上有效运行。
AI.method: 基于大气去雾可简化为低频深度场支配的逐像素仿射变换这一观察，提出LiBrA-Net：将时空仿射场分解为空间-颜色和时间双边子网格，在固定低分辨率下预测系数，在gl(3)李代数下融合并施加群论正则化，通过Cayley参数化映射为可逆GL(3)变换，通过轻量级输入引导分支恢复高频细节。
AI.result: 在UHV-4K、REVIDE和HazeWorld数据集上，LiBrA-Net在相比的视频去雾方法中达到新的最先进水平，能够在单GPU上以25 FPS处理原生4K视频，仅需6.12M参数。
AI.conclusion: 该工作通过理论创新和工程优化，实现了UHD视频去雾的实时处理，填补了领域空白，为后续研究提供了重要的基准和方法学基础。

title: YFPO: A Preliminary Study of Yoked Feature Preference Optimization with Neuron-Guided Rewards for Mathematical Reasoning
summary: Preference optimization has become an important post-training paradigm for improving the reasoning abilities of large language models. Existing methods typically rely on externally constructed preference data, using preferred and dispreferred responses as sample-level supervision. However, such external signals rarely make explicit use of capability-related information contained in the model's internal representations. For mathematical reasoning, certain neuron groups may exhibit activation patterns associated with mathematical knowledge, symbolic manipulation, or logical reasoning. Similar to reflexive behavioral signals, these internal activations may provide a coarse indication of whether the model is engaging math-related capabilities.We introduce YFPO, short for Yoked Feature Preference Optimization, a preliminary neuron-guided preference optimization framework for mathematical reasoning. YFPO first uses AttnLRP to identify math-related neurons, and then constructs an auxiliary reward from their activation margin between preferred and dispreferred responses. This design augments external preference learning with internal neuron-level signals. We conduct preliminary experiments on a small-scale language model using GSM8K as the main benchmark. Results suggest that neuron-level signals can interact with preference optimization and occasionally improve reasoning performance, offering a promising direction for more fine-grained and interpretable reasoning-oriented post-training.

AI.tldr: YFPO是一种将模型内部神经元激活信号与传统偏好优化相结合的数学推理增强框架，通过识别数学相关神经元构建辅助奖励来提升推理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有偏好优化方法主要依赖外部构建的偏好数据进行样本级监督，但很少利用模型内部表示中包含的能力相关信息。对于数学推理，某些神经元群可能表现出与数学知识、符号操作或逻辑推理相关的激活模式，这些内部激活可以为模型是否使用数学相关能力提供粗略指示。
AI.method: YFPO框架首先使用AttnLRP技术识别数学相关神经元，然后基于偏好和厌恶响应之间这些神经元的激活差值构建辅助奖励，将内部神经元级信号与外部偏好学习相结合来优化模型。
AI.result: 在小型语言模型和GSM8K基准上的初步实验表明，神经元级信号可以与偏好优化相互作用，偶尔能够提升推理性能，为更细粒度和可解释的推理导向后训练提供了有前景的方向。
AI.conclusion: YFPO证明了利用模型内部神经元激活信号增强偏好优化的可行性，为数学推理等复杂任务的后训练提供了新的思路，有望实现更精细和可解释的模型优化。

title: PointGS: Semantic-Consistent Unsupervised 3D Point Cloud Segmentation with 3D Gaussian Splatting
comment: Accepted by Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2026
summary: Unsupervised point cloud segmentation is critical for embodied artificial intelligence and autonomous driving, as it mitigates the prohibitive cost of dense point-level annotations required by fully supervised methods. While integrating 2D pre-trained models such as the Segment Anything Model (SAM) to supplement semantic information is a natural choice, this approach faces a fundamental mismatch between discrete 3D points and continuous 2D images. This mismatch leads to inevitable projection overlap and complex modality alignment, resulting in compromised semantic consistency across 2D-3D transfer. To address these limitations, this paper proposes PointGS, a simple yet effective pipeline for unsupervised 3D point cloud segmentation. PointGS leverages 3D Gaussian Splatting as a unified intermediate representation to bridge the discrete-continuous domain gap. Input sparse point clouds are first reconstructed into dense 3D Gaussian spaces via multi-view observations, filling spatial gaps and encoding occlusion relationships to eliminate projection-induced semantic conflation. Multi-view dense images are rendered from the Gaussian space, with 2D semantic masks extracted via SAM, and semantics are distilled to 3D Gaussian primitives through contrastive learning to ensure consistent semantic assignments across different views. The Gaussian space is aligned with the original point cloud via two-step registration, and point semantics are assigned through nearest-neighbor search on labeled Gaussians. Experiments demonstrate that PointGS outperforms state-of-the-art unsupervised methods, achieving +0.9% mIoU on ScanNet-V2 and +2.8% mIoU on S3DIS.

AI.tldr: PointGS是一种无监督3D点云分割方法，利用3D高斯泼洒作为统一中间表示，通过SAM提取2D语义并蒸馏到3D高斯原语，解决了2D-3D模态不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 无监督点云分割对 embodied AI 和自动驾驶至关重要，可避免密集标注的高成本。现有方法通过集成2D预训练模型（如SAM）补充语义信息，但面临离散3D点与连续2D图像的根本不匹配，导致投影重叠和语义一致性问题。
AI.method: PointGS采用3D高斯泼洒作为统一中间表示：1) 通过多视角观测将稀疏点云重建为密集3D高斯空间，填充空间间隙并编码遮挡关系；2) 从高斯空间渲染多视角密集图像，用SAM提取2D语义掩码；3) 通过对比学习将语义蒸馏到3D高斯原语；4) 通过两步注册对齐高斯空间与原始点云，基于最近邻搜索分配点语义。
AI.result: 在ScanNet-V2和S3DIS数据集上，PointGS分别实现了+0.9%和+2.8%的mIoU提升，显著优于现有最先进无监督方法。
AI.conclusion: PointGS通过3D高斯泼洒成功桥接了离散-连续域差距，有效解决了2D-3D语义迁移中的不一致性问题，为无监督点云分割提供了简单而有效的解决方案。

title: Enhancing Target-Guided Proactive Dialogue Systems via Conversational Scenario Modeling and Intent-Keyword Bridging
summary: A target-guided proactive dialogue system aims to steer conversations proactively toward pre-defined targets, such as designated keywords or specific topics. During guided conversations, dynamically modeling conversational scenarios and intent keywords to guide system utterance generation is beneficial; however, existing work largely overlooks this aspect, resulting in a mismatch with the dynamics of real-world conversations. In this paper, we jointly model user profiles and domain knowledge as conversational scenarios to introduce a scenario bias that dynamically influences system utterances, and employ intent-keyword bridging to predict intent keywords for upcoming dialogue turns, providing higher level and more flexible guidance. Extensive automatic and human evaluations demonstrate the effectiveness of conversational scenario modeling and intent keyword bridging, yielding substantial improvements in proactivity, fluency, and informativeness for target-guided proactive dialogue systems, thereby narrowing the gap with real world interactions.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种目标引导的主动对话系统，通过联合建模用户画像和领域知识作为会话场景，并使用意图关键词桥接技术来动态预测后续对话的意图关键词，显著提升了系统的主动性和流畅性。
AI.motivation: 现有的目标引导主动对话系统大多忽略了动态建模对话场景和意图关键词，导致与真实对话的动态特性不匹配，无法有效引导对话向预定目标发展。
AI.method: 通过联合建模用户画像和领域知识构建对话场景模型，引入场景偏差动态影响系统话语，同时采用意图关键词桥接技术预测未来对话轮次的意图关键词，提供更高层次和更灵活的引导。
AI.result: 自动评估和人工评估结果表明，所提出的方法在主动性、流畅性和信息量方面都有显著改进，有效缩小了与真实世界对话的差距。
AI.conclusion: 会话场景建模和意图关键词桥接技术对提升目标引导主动对话系统性能具有重要作用，为构建更贴近真实对话场景的智能系统提供了有效解决方案。

title: XWOD: A Real-World Benchmark for Object Detection under Extreme Weather Conditions
summary: Autonomous driving and intelligent transportation systems remain vulnerable under extreme weather. The U.S. Federal Highway Administration reports that roughly 745,000 crashes and 3,800 fatalities per year are weather-related, and recent regulatory investigations have examined failures of Level-2/3 driving systems under reduced-visibility conditions. However, datasets commonly used to evaluate weather robustness remain limited in scale, diversity, and realism. In this paper, we introduce XWOD (Extreme Weather Object Detection), a large-scale real-world traffic-object detection benchmark containing 10,010 images and 42,924 bounding boxes across seven extreme weather conditions: rain, snow, fog, haze/sand/dust, flooding, tornado, and wildfire. The dataset covers six traffic-object categories, including car, person, truck, motorcycle, bicycle, and bus. XWOD extends the weather taxonomy from one to seven conditions, and is the first to cover the emerging class of climate-amplified hazards, such as flooding, tornado, and wildfire. To evaluate the quality of our data, we train standard YOLO-family detectors on XWOD and test them zero-shot on external weather benchmarks, achieving mAP$_{50}$ scores of 63.00% on RTTS, 59.94% on DAWN, and 61.12% on WEDGE, compared with the corresponding published YOLO-based baselines of 40.37%, 32.75%, and 45.41%, respectively, representing relative improvements of 56%, 83%, and 35%. These cross-dataset results show that XWOD provides a strong source domain for learning weather-robust traffic perception. We release the dataset, splits, baseline weights, and reproducible evaluation code under a research-use license.

AI.tldr: XWOD是一个大规模真实世界的极端天气交通目标检测基准数据集，包含10,010张图像和7种极端天气条件，验证了其在提升自动驾驶系统天气鲁棒性方面的有效性。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶和智能交通系统在极端天气条件下仍然存在脆弱性，每年造成大量交通事故和人员伤亡，但现有的天气鲁棒性评估数据集在规模、多样性和真实性方面都有限制。
AI.method: 创建了XWOD数据集，涵盖7种极端天气条件（雨、雪、雾、霾/沙尘、洪水、龙卷风、野火）和6个交通目标类别，使用YOLO系列检测器进行训练和零样本测试来评估数据质量。
AI.result: 在RTTS、DAWN和WEDGE等外部天气基准上，基于XWOD训练的检测器分别获得63.00%、59.94%和61.12%的mAP50分数，相比现有基线分别提升56%、83%和35%。
AI.conclusion: XWOD为学习天气鲁棒的交通感知提供了强大的源域，验证了其在提升自动驾驶系统极端天气条件下目标检测能力的有效性，并公开了数据集、代码和模型权重供研究使用。

title: On Predicting the Post-training Potential of Pre-trained LLMs
summary: The performance of Large Language Models (LLMs) on downstream tasks is fundamentally constrained by the capabilities acquired during pre-training. However, traditional benchmarks like MMLU often fail to reflect a base model's plasticity in complex open-ended scenarios, leading to inefficient model selection. We address this by introducing a new task of predicting post-training potential - forecasting a base model's performance before post-training. We propose RuDE (Rubric-based Discriminative Evaluation), a unified framework that bypasses the generation gap of base models by leveraging response discrimination. Guided by our systematic 4C Taxonomy, RuDE constructs controlled contrastive pairs across diverse domains by fine-grained rubric violations. Extensive experiments demonstrate a correlation greater than 90% with post-training performance. Crucially, validation via Reinforcement Learning (RL) confirms that RuDE effectively identifies high-potential smaller models that outperform larger counterparts, offering a compute-efficient mechanism for foundation model development.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文提出了RuDE框架，通过基于评分标准的判别式评估方法，能够预测基础模型经过后训练后可能达到的性能，为高效模型选择提供了新的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 传统基准测试如MMLU无法有效反映基础模型在复杂开放场景中的可塑性，导致模型选择效率低下。研究团队需要找到一种方法来预测模型经过后训练后的潜在性能表现。
AI.method: 提出RuDE（基于评分标准的判别式评估）框架，利用响应判别绕过基础模型的生成差距。通过4C分类学系统指导，构建跨多样化领域的精细化评分标准违规对比样本对。
AI.result: 实验证明RuDE与后训练性能的相关性超过90%。通过强化学习验证，确认RuDE能有效识别高潜力的小型模型，这些模型在性能上超过了更大的同类模型。
AI.conclusion: RuDE为基础模型开发提供了计算高效的机制，能够在训练前准确识别具有高潜力的模型，显著提升了模型选择的效率和准确性。

title: GeoR-Bench: Evaluating Geoscience Visual Reasoning
summary: Geoscience intelligence is expected to understand, reason about, and predict earth system changes to support human decision-making in critical domains such as disaster response, climate adaptation and environmental protection. Although current research has shown promising progress on specific geoscience tasks, such as remote sensing interpretation, geographic question-answering, existing benchmarks remain largely task-specific which failing to capture the open-ended real world geoscience problems. As a result, it remains unclear how far current AI systems are from achieving genuine geoscience intelligence. To address this gap, we present \textbf{GeoR-Bench}, a \underline{Bench}mark for evaluating \underline{Geo}science visual \underline{R}easoning through reasoning informed visual editing tasks. GeoR-Bench contains 440 curated samples spanning 6 geoscience categories and 24 task types, covering earth observation imagery and structured scientific representations such as maps and diagrams. We evaluate outputs along three dimensions, including reasoning, consistency, and quality. Benchmark results of 21 closed- and open-source multimodal models reveal that geoscience reasoning remains a critical bottleneck. The highest-performing model achieves 42.7\% overall strict accuracy, while the best open-source models only get 10.3\%. Notably, the visual consistency and image quality of the outputs frequently surpass their scientific accuracy. Ultimately, these findings indicate that current models generate superficially plausible results but fail to capture underlying earth science processes.

AI.tldr: 研究人员提出了GeoR-Bench基准测试，用于评估地球科学视觉推理能力。测试结果显示，当前AI模型在地球科学推理方面存在显著瓶颈，最佳模型仅获得42.7%的严格准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有地球科学AI研究多为任务特定，无法捕捉开放式的现实世界问题，缺乏对真正地球科学智能能力的全面评估。
AI.method: 构建GeoR-Bench基准，包含440个样本，涵盖6个地球科学类别和24种任务类型，通过视觉编辑任务评估模型的推理、一致性和质量三个维度。
AI.result: 对21个多模态模型的测试表明，地球科学推理是关键瓶颈，最高准确率仅42.7%，开源模型仅10.3%，模型生成结果在视觉一致性和图像质量上往往优于科学准确性。
AI.conclusion: 当前AI模型能够生成表面上合理的结果，但无法捕捉底层的地球科学过程，距离真正的地球科学智能仍有很大差距。

title: Towards Visually-Guided Movie Subtitle Translation for Indic Languages
summary: Movie subtitle translation is inherently multimodal, yet text-only systems often miss visual cues needed to convey emotion, action, and social nuance, especially for low-resource Indic languages (English to Hindi, Bengali, Telugu, Tamil and Kannada). We present a case study on five full-length films and compare two lightweight visual grounding strategies: structured attribute summaries from a 5-minute sliding window and free-text summaries of inter-subtitle visual gaps. Our analysis shows that temporal misalignment between subtitles and frames is a major obstacle in long-form video, often rendering indiscriminate visual grounding ineffective. However, oracle selective grounding, which replaces only the lowest-quality 20-30\% of baseline segments with visual-enhanced outputs, consistently improves COMET over the text-only baseline while requiring far less visual processing. Among the two approaches, coarse attribute-based visual context summarization is more robust, capturing scene-level emotion and contextual subtle cues that text alone often misses

AI.tldr: 该研究通过电影字幕翻译案例发现，视觉语境信息对改善低资源印度语种翻译质量至关重要，其中基于属性的视觉概要方法更为有效。
AI.motivation: 纯文本翻译系统在电影字幕翻译中缺乏视觉线索，无法有效传达情感、动作和社会细微差别，特别是对于英语到印度语等低资源语言对。
AI.method: 在五部完整电影上进行案例研究，比较两种轻量级视觉锚定策略：5分钟滑动窗口的结构化属性概要和字幕间视觉间隙的自由文本概要。
AI.result: 时间错位是长视频中的主要障碍，但有选择性的视觉锚定（仅替换20-30%最低质量片段）能显著改善COMET分数，基于属性的视觉概要方法更加稳健。
AI.conclusion: 针对长视频翻译，选择性视觉锚定和属性驱动的视觉概要是提升翻译质量的有效策略，在处理视觉与文本时序对齐方面具有实际应用价值。

title: The DAWN of World-Action Interactive Models
summary: A plausible scene evolution depends on the maneuver being considered, while a good maneuver depends on how the scene may evolve. Existing World Action Models (WAMs) largely miss this reciprocity, treating world prediction and action generation as either isolated parallel branches or rigid predict-then-plan pipelines. We formalize this perspective as World-Action Interactive Models (WAIMs), and instantiate it in autonomous driving with \textbf{DAWN} (\textbf{D}enoising \textbf{A}ctions and \textbf{W}orld i\textbf{N}teractive model), a simple yet strong latent generative baseline. DAWN operates in a compact semantic latent space and couples a \emph{World Predictor} with a \emph{World-Conditioned Action Denoiser}: the predicted world hypothesis conditions action denoising, while the denoised action hypothesis is fed back to update the world prediction, so that both are recursively refined during inference. Rather than eliminating test-time world evolution altogether or rolling out the full future in pixel space, DAWN performs a short explicit latent rollout that is sufficient to support long-horizon trajectory generation in complex interactive scenes. Experiments show that DAWN achieves strong planning performance and favorable safety-related results across multiple autonomous driving benchmarks. More broadly, our results suggest that interactive world-action generation is a principled path toward truly actionable world models.

AI.tldr: DAWN模型通过世界-行动交互机制，在潜在空间中递归地细化世界预测和行动生成，在自动驾驶任务中实现了强大的规划性能。
AI.motivation: 现有世界动作模型(WAMs)忽略了场景演化和动作决策之间的相互依赖关系，将两者视为独立的并行分支或刚性预测-规划流程，这限制了模型的决策质量。
AI.method: 提出世界-行动交互模型(WAIMs)框架，具体实现为DAWN模型。在紧凑语义潜在空间中，将世界预测器与世界条件动作去噪器耦合：预测的世界假设条件化动作去噪，同时去噪后的动作假设反馈更新世界预测，实现递归细化。
AI.result: DAWN在多个自动驾驶基准测试中取得了强大的规划性能和良好的安全相关结果，能够在复杂交互场景中支持长时程轨迹生成。
AI.conclusion: 交互式世界-行动生成是构建真正可行动世界模型的有效路径，DAWN验证了这种 principled 方法的有效性。

title: Learning Agentic Policy from Action Guidance
summary: Agentic reinforcement learning (RL) for Large Language Models (LLMs) critically depends on the exploration capability of the base policy, as training signals emerge only within its in-capability region. For tasks where the base policy cannot reach reward states, additional training or external guidance is needed to recover effective learning signals. Rather than relying on costly iterative supervised fine tuning (SFT), we exploit the abundant action data generated in everyday human interactions. We propose \textsc{ActGuide-RL}, which injects action data as plan-style reference guidance, enabling the agentic policy to overcome reachability barriers to reward states. Guided and unguided rollouts are then jointly optimized via mixed-policy training, internalizing the exploration gains back into the unguided policy. Motivated by a theoretical and empirical analysis of the benefit-risk trade-off, we adopt a minimal intervention principle that invokes guidance only as an adaptive fallback, matching task difficulty while minimizing off-policy risk. On search-agent benchmarks, \textsc{ActGuide-RL} substantially improves over zero RL (+10.7 pp on GAIA and +19 pp on XBench with Qwen3-4B), and performs on par with the SFT+RL pipeline without any cold start. This suggests a new paradigm for agentic RL that reduces the reliance on heavy SFT data by using scalable action guidance instead.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ActGuide-RL方法，利用人类交互产生的动作数据作为引导，帮助大语言模型代理突破奖励状态可达性障碍，显著提升智能体强化学习效果，减少对监督微调数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型的代理强化学习严重依赖基础策略的探索能力，当基础策略无法达到奖励状态时，训练信号会缺失。传统的解决方法需要昂贵的迭代监督微调或外部引导。
AI.method: 提出ActGuide-RL框架，将人类交互产生的动作数据作为计划式参考引导注入，使代理策略突破奖励状态可达性障碍；通过混合策略训练联合优化引导和非引导轨迹，采用最小干预原则仅在必要时提供自适应引导。
AI.result: 在搜索代理基准测试上，ActGuide-RL显著超越零样本基线（GAIA上提升10.7个百分点，XBench上提升19个百分点），可与SFT+RL流程相媲美，且无需冷启动。
AI.conclusion: ActGuide-RL展示了通过可扩展的动作引导替代繁重监督微调数据的新范式，为代理强化学习提供了更高效的数据利用方式，降低了对监督微调的依赖。

title: ScribbleDose: Scribble-Guided Dose Prediction in Radiotherapy
comment: This is a preprint version of the paper. The final version will appear in the proceedings of MICCAI 2026
summary: Anatomical structure masks are widely adopted in radiotherapy dose prediction, as they provide explicit geometric constraints that facilitate structure-dose coupling. However, conventional manual delineation of these masks requires precise annotation of structure boundaries relevant to radiotherapy, which is time-consuming and labor-intensive. To address these limitations, we propose a scribble-guided dose prediction framework that relies solely on anatomical structures annotated with sparse scribbles. Specifically, we design a Scribble Completion Module (SCM) to generate dense anatomical masks by propagating sparse scribble labels to semantically similar voxels. During the propagation process, a supervoxel-based regularization is introduced to preserve geometric boundary consistency to ensure anatomical plausibility. Furthermore, we propose a Structure-Guided Dose Generation Module (SGDGM) to strengthen the correspondence between sparse structural cues and dose distribution. The completed dense masks derived from scribbles serve as structural guidance to condition dose prediction, forming a scribble-mask-dose learning pipeline under sparse annotation. Experiments on the GDP-HMM dataset demonstrate that ScribbleDose achieves competitive dose prediction performance using only sparse structural annotations. The source code and reannotated scribble annotations are publicly available at https://github.com/iCherishxixixi/ScribbleDose.

AI.tldr: ScribbleDose是一种基于稀疏涂鸦标注的放疗剂量预测框架，通过自动补全解剖结构掩码，实现了仅使用少量标注即可获得准确的剂量预测效果。
AI.motivation: 传统的放疗剂量预测需要精确的手动解剖结构标注，这一过程耗时费力且需要专业知识。为了解决标注成本高的问题，研究者提出使用稀疏涂鸦替代完整标注，从而大幅降低标注工作量。
AI.method: 该方法包含两个核心模块：1) 涂鸦补全模块(SCM)通过超体素正则化将稀疏涂鸦传播到语义相似的体素，生成密集的解剖结构掩码；2) 结构引导剂量生成模块(SGDGM)利用补全的掩码作为结构指导，加强结构线索与剂量分布的对应关系。整体形成涂鸦-掩码-剂量的学习流水线。
AI.result: 在GDP-HMM数据集上的实验表明，ScribbleDose仅使用稀疏结构标注就能达到与传统方法相当的剂量预测性能，证明了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功地将稀疏涂鸦标注引入放疗剂量预测领域，显著降低了标注成本，同时保持了预测精度，为临床应用提供了一种实用的解决方案。代码和标注已公开，便于后续研究使用。

title: SAGE: Scalable Automated Robustness Augmentation for LLM Knowledge Evaluation
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve strong performance on standard knowledge evaluation benchmarks, yet recent work shows that their knowledge capabilities remain brittle under question variants that test the same knowledge in different forms. Robustness augmentation of existing knowledge evaluation benchmarks is therefore necessary, but current LLM-assisted generate-then-verify pipelines are costly and difficult to scale due to low-yield variant generation and unreliable variant verification. We propose SAGE (Scalable Automated Generation of Robustness BEnchmarks), a framework for scalable robustness augmentation of knowledge evaluation benchmarks using fine-tuned smaller models. SAGE consists of VariantQual, a rubric-based verifier trained on human-labeled seed data, and VariantGen, a variant generator initialized with supervised fine-tuning and further optimized with reinforcement learning using VariantQual as the reward model. Experiments on HellaSwag show that SAGE constructs a large-scale robustness-augmented benchmark with quality comparable to the human-annotated HellaSwag-Pro at substantially lower cost, while the fine-tuned models further generalize to MMLU without benchmark-specific fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: SAGE是一种可扩展的自动化框架，通过微调小模型来生成高质量的知识评估基准鲁棒性增强数据集，成本低且质量媲美人工标注。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在标准知识评估基准上表现良好，但在测试相同知识的变体问题时表现脆弱。现有的LLM辅助生成-验证流程成本高昂且难以扩展，主要由于变体生成效率低和验证不可靠。
AI.method: SAGE框架包含两个组件：1) VariantQual，基于人类标注的种子数据训练的质量验证器；2) VariantGen，通过监督微调初始化，再使用VariantQual作为奖励模型进行强化学习优化的变体生成器。整个流程使用微调的小模型而非大型LLM。
AI.result: 在HellaSwag上的实验表明，SAGE能以远低成本构建大规模鲁棒性增强基准，质量与人工标注的HellaSwag-Pro相当。微调模型还能泛化到MMLU数据集，无需基准特定的微调。
AI.conclusion: SAGE为知识评估基准的鲁棒性增强提供了一种可扩展、低成本的解决方案，通过使用小模型微调和强化学习训练，实现了高质量变体数据集的自动化生成，具有良好的泛化能力。

title: When Looking Is Not Enough: Visual Attention Structure Reveals Hallucination in MLLMs
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have become a key interface for visual reasoning and grounded question answering, yet they remain vulnerable to visual hallucinations, where generated responses contradict image content or mention nonexistent objects. A central challenge is that hallucination is not always caused by a simple lack of visual attention: the model may still assign substantial attention mass to image tokens while internally drifting toward an incorrect answer. In this paper, we show that the high-frequency structure of visual attention, measured by layer-wise Laplacian energy, reveals both the layer where hallucinated preferences emerge and the layer where the ground-truth answer transiently recovers. Building on this finding, we propose LaSCD (Laplacian-Spectral Contrastive Decoding), a training-free decoding strategy that selects informative layers via Laplacian energy and remaps next-token logits in closed form. Experiments on hallucination and general multimodal benchmarks show that LaSCD consistently reduces hallucination while preserving general capabilities, highlighting its potential as a faithful decoding paradigm. The code is available at https://github.com/macovaseas/LaSCD.

AI.tldr: LaSCD是一种基于拉普拉斯能量的无训练解码策略，通过分析视觉注意力的层间高频结构来减少多模态大语言模型的视觉幻觉，同时保持模型的通用能力。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)容易出现视觉幻觉现象，即生成的回答与图像内容矛盾或提到不存在的对象。传统的视觉注意力机制无法完全解释这种现象，因为模型可能仍然对图像token分配大量注意力，但内部却得出错误答案。
AI.method: 通过层间拉普拉斯能量度量视觉注意力的高频结构，发现幻觉偏好出现的层和真实答案短暂恢复的层。基于此提出LaSCD（拉普拉斯频谱对比解码）方法，通过拉普拉斯能量选择信息丰富的层，并以闭式形式重映射下一token的logits。
AI.result: 在幻觉和通用多模态基准测试上的实验表明，LaSCD能够一致地减少幻觉现象，同时保持模型的通用能力，证明其作为一种忠实解码范式的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了视觉注意力的层间高频结构在理解和解决MLLMs幻觉中的关键作用，LaSCD作为一种简单有效的无训练方法，为提高多模大语言模型的可靠性提供了新的技术路径。

title: Caraman at SemEval-2026 Task 8: Three-Stage Multi-Turn Retrieval with Query Rewriting, Hybrid Search, and Cross-Encoder Reranking
summary: We describe our system for SemEval-2026 Task 8 (MTRAGEval), participating in Task A (Retrieval) across four English-language domains. Our approach employs a three-stage pipeline: (1) query rewriting via a LoRA-fine-tuned Qwen 2.5 7B model that transforms context-dependent follow-up questions into standalone queries, (2) hybrid BM25 and dense retrieval combined through Reciprocal Rank Fusion, and (3) cross-encoder reranking with BGE-reranker-v2-m3. On the official test set, the system achieves nDCG@5 of 0.531, ranking 8th out of 38 participating systems and 10.7% above the organizer baseline. Development comparisons reveal that domain-specific temperature tuning for query generation, where technical domains benefit from deterministic decoding and general domains from controlled randomness, provides consistent gains, while more complex strategies such as domain-aware prompting and multi-query expansion degrade performance.

AI.tldr: 该系统为SemEval-2026任务8设计，采用三阶段管道（查询重写→混合检索→重排序），在38个系统中排名第8，nDCG@5达0.531，超过基线10.7%。
AI.motivation: 解决上下文依赖的跟进问题检索挑战，提高多领域英文检索任务的性能，特别是将依赖对话历史的问题转换为独立查询。
AI.method: 三阶段管道：1）使用LoRA微调的Qwen 2.5 7B模型进行查询重写；2）BM25和稠密检索混合通过Reciprocal Rank Fusion；3）BGE-reranker-v2-m3交叉编码器重排序。
AI.result: 在官方测试集上达到nDCG@5为0.531，在38个系统中排名第8位，比组织者基线高出10.7%。域特定温度调优带来一致提升。
AI.conclusion: 域特定的温度调优是有效的改进策略，技术领域受益于确定性解码，一般领域受益于受控随机性。更复杂的策略如域感知提示和多查询扩展反而降低了性能。

title: TCP-SSM: Efficient Vision State Space Models with Token-Conditioned Poles
summary: State Space Models (SSMs) have emerged as a compelling alternative to attention models for long-range vision tasks, offering input-dependent recurrence with linear complexity. However, most efficient SSM variants reduce computation cost by modifying scan routes, resolutions, or traversal patterns, while largely leaving the recurrent dynamics implicit. Consequently, the model's state-dependent memory behavior is difficult to control, particularly in compact backbones where long scan paths can exceed the effective memory horizon. We propose Token-Conditioned Poles SSM (TCP-SSM), a structured selective SSM framework that improves efficiency while making recurrence dynamics explicit and interpretable through stable poles. TCP-SSM builds each scan operator with 1) real poles that model monotone or sign-alternating decay, and 2) complex-conjugate poles that capture damped oscillatory responses. Using bounded radius and angle modulation, TCP-SSM converts shared base poles into token-dependent poles, allowing each scan step to adapt its memory behavior to the current visual token while preserving pole stability. For practical scalability, we integrate grouped pole sharing with a lightweight low-rank input pathway, yielding an efficient scan operator that preserves linear-time scan complexity. Across image classification, semantic segmentation, and object detection, TCP-SSM reduces SSM computation complexity up to 44% in Vision Mamba-style models while maintaining or surpassing baseline accuracy.

AI.tldr: TCP-SSM是一种通过显式控制稳定极点来改进状态空间模型效率的结构化框架，在保持线性复杂度的同时，大幅降低计算成本并提升长程视觉任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有高效SSM变体主要通过修改扫描路径等方式降低计算成本，但保持隐式递归动态，使得模型的状态相关记忆行为难以控制，特别是在紧凑骨干网络中长扫描路径可能超出有效记忆范围。
AI.method: 提出基于极点的结构化选择性SSM框架TCP-SSM，使用实极点建模单调或符号交替衰减，复共轭极点捕获阻尼振荡响应，通过有界半径和角度调制将共享基极点转换为token依赖极点，并集成分组极点共享与轻量低秩输入路径。
AI.result: 在图像分类、语义分割和目标检测任务中，TCP-SSM将Vision Mamba风格模型的SSM计算复杂度降低44%，同时保持或超越基准准确率。
AI.conclusion: TCP-SSM通过显式且可解释的极点控制实现了高效的状态空间建模，为长程视觉任务提供了计算效率优化的新解决方案。

title: SkillGraph: Skill-Augmented Reinforcement Learning for Agents via Evolving Skill Graphs
summary: Skill libraries enable large language model agents to reuse experience from past interactions, but most existing libraries store skills as isolated entries and retrieve them only by semantic similarity. This leads to two key challenges for compositional tasks. Firstly, an agent must identify not only relevant skills but also how they depend on and build upon each other. Secondly, it also makes library maintenance difficult, since the system lacks structural cues for deciding when skills should be merged, split, or removed. We propose SKILLGRAPH, a framework that represents reusable skills as nodes in a directed graph, with typed edges encoding prerequisite, enhancement, and co-occurrence relations. Given a new task, SKILLGRAPH retrieves not just individual skills, but an ordered skill subgraph that can guide multi-step decision making. The graph is continuously updated from agent trajectories and reinforcement learning feedback, allowing both the skill library and the agent policy to improve together. Experiments on ALFWorld, WebShop, and seven search-augmented QA tasks show that SKILLGRAPH achieves state-of-the-art performance against memory-augmented RL methods, with especially large gains on complex tasks that require composing multiple skills.

AI.tldr: SKILLGRAPH框架将技能表示为有向图中的节点，通过类型化边编码技能间关系，实现技能组合检索和动态更新，在复杂任务上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有技能库将技能作为孤立条目存储，仅通过语义相似性检索，导致无法识别技能间的依赖关系和组合方式，同时使库维护困难。这阻碍了大语言模型智能体在组合性任务上的表现。
AI.method: 提出SKILLGRAPH框架，将可重用技能表示为有向图节点，通过类型化边编码前提、增强和共存关系。面对新任务时检索有序技能子图指导多步决策。图表从智能体轨迹和强化学习反馈中持续更新，实现技能库和策略的共同改进。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld、WebShop和七项搜索增强QA任务上的实验表明，SKILLGRAPH相比记忆增强RL方法达到最先进性能，在需要组合多个技能的复杂任务上提升尤其显著。
AI.conclusion: SKILLGRAPH通过结构化技能表示和基于图的检索方法，有效解决了技能组合和维护的挑战，为大语言模型智能体在复杂任务上的应用提供了新思路。

title: Dynamic Execution Commitment of Vision-Language-Action Models
comment: Code will be released in the next version
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models predominantly adopt action chunking, i.e., predicting and committing to a short horizon of consecutive low-level actions in a single forward pass, to amortize the inference cost of large-scale backbones and reduce per-step latency. However, committing these multi-step predictions to real-world execution requires balancing success rate against inference efficiency, a decision typically governed by fixed execution horizons tuned per task. Such heuristics ignore the state-dependent nature of predictive reliability, leading to brittle performance in dynamic or out-of-distribution settings. In this paper, we introduce A3, an Adaptive Action Acceptance mechanism that reframes dynamic execution commitment as a self-speculative prefix verification problem. A3 first computes a trajectory-wise consensus score of actions via group sampling, then selects a representative draft and prioritizes downstream verification. Specifically, it enforces: (1) consensus-ordered conditional invariance, which validates low-consensus actions by judging whether they remain consistent when re-decoded conditioned on high-consensus actions; and (2) prefix-closed sequential consistency, which guarantees physical rollout integrity by accepting only the longest continuous sequence of verified actions starting from the beginning. Consequently, the execution horizon emerges as the longest verifiable prefix satisfying both internal model logic and sequential execution constraints. Experiments across diverse VLA models and benchmarks demonstrate that A3 eliminates the need for manual horizon tuning while achieving a superior trade-off between execution robustness and inference throughput.

AI.tldr: A3是一种自适应动作接受机制，通过将动态执行承诺重新定义为自投机前缀验证问题，根据动作预测的可靠性动态调整执行范围，无需人工调参即可在执行鲁棒性和推理吞吐量之间实现更好的平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有的VLA模型采用固定的动作块大小进行执行，这种方式忽略了预测可靠性在不同状态下的变化特性，在动态或分布外场景中表现脆弱，需要针对每个任务手动调整执行范围。
AI.method: A3机制通过群采样计算动作级别的共识分数，然后执行两个关键验证：(1)共识排序的条件不变性，通过高共识动作验证低共识动作的一致性；(2)前封闭序列一致性，只接受从开始的、通过验证的最长连续动作序列。
AI.result: 在多个VLA模型和基准测试上的实验表明，A3消除了手动范围调优的需求，在执行鲁棒性和推理吞吐量之间取得了卓越的平衡。
AI.conclusion: A3将执行范围重新定义为满足内部模型逻辑和序列执行约束的最长可验证前缀，使系统能够根据预测的可靠性动态调整执行策略，显著提升了VLA模型在复杂环境下的适应性。

title: Is Child-Directed Language Optimized for Word Learning? A Computational Study of Verb Meaning Acquisition
summary: Is child-directed language (CDL) optimized to support language learning, and which aspects of linguistic development does it facilitate? We investigate this question using neural language models trained on CDL versus adult-directed language (ADL). We selectively remove syntactic or lexical co-occurrence information from the model training data, and evaluate the impact of these manipulations on verb meaning acquisition. While disrupting syntax impairs learning across all datasets, models trained on CDL and spoken ADL show significantly higher resilience than those trained on written input. Tracking semantic and syntactic performance over training, we observe a semantic-first trajectory, with verb meanings emerging prior to robust syntactic proficiency, an asynchrony most pronounced in the spoken domain, especially CDL. These results suggest that the advantage for verb learning previously attributed to CDL may instead reflect broader properties of the spoken register, rather than a uniquely CDL-specific optimization.

AI.tldr: 研究表明，儿童导向语言在动词习得方面的优势可能源于口语语域的普遍特性，而非其独特的优化设计。
AI.motivation: 探究儿童导向语言是否为语言学习而优化，以及它促进哪些语言发展方面。
AI.method: 使用神经语言模型，对比训练在儿童导向语言和成人导向语言上的表现，通过选择性移除语法或词汇共现信息，评估动词意义习得的影响。
AI.result: 语法破坏对所有数据集的学习都有损害，但儿童导向语言和口语成人导向语言模型的韧性显著高于书面输入模型。观察到语义优先的学习轨迹，动词意义的出现早于语法熟练度，这种异步性在口语领域尤其明显。
AI.conclusion: 之前归因于儿童导向语言的动词学习优势，实际上可能反映了口语语域的更广泛特性，而非儿童导向语言特有的优化。

title: TB-AVA: Text as a Semantic Bridge for Audio-Visual Parameter Efficient Finetuning
summary: Audio-visual understanding requires effective alignment between heterogeneous modalities, yet cross-modal correspondence remains challenging when temporally aligned audio and visual signals lack clear semantic correspondence.We propose to use text as a semantic anchor for audio-visual representation learning.To this end, we introduce a parameter-efficient adaptation frameworkbuilt on frozen audio and visual encoders, centered on Text-Bridged Audio-Visual Adapter (TB-AVA), which enables text-mediated interaction between audio and visual streams. At the core of TB-AVA, Gated Semantic Modulation (GSM) selectively modulates feature channels based on text-inferred semantic relevance. We evaluate the proposed approach on multiple benchmarks, including AVE, AVS, and AVVP, where the proposed framework achieves state-of-the-art performance, demonstrating text as an effective semantic anchor for parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) in audio-visual learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于文本桥接的音视频适配器(TB-AVA)框架，利用文本作为语义锚点，通过门控语义调制技术实现高效的音视听觉表征学习。
AI.motivation: 音视听觉理解中存在关键挑战：即使音频和视觉信号在时间上对齐，它们之间往往缺乏明确的语义对应关系，导致跨模态对齐困难。
AI.method: 构建基于冻结音频和视觉编码器的参数高效适应框架，通过TB-AVA适配器实现文本介导的音视交互，核心是门控语义调制(GSM)机制，根据文本推断的语义相关性选择性地调制特征通道。
AI.result: 在AVE、AVS和AVVP等多个基准测试中达到最先进性能，证明了文本作为语义锚点在参数高效微调中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 文本作为语义锚点为音视听觉学习提供了有效的语义 bridge，TB-AVA框架展示了参数高效适配在跨模态理解任务中的巨大潜力。

title: Do Language Models Encode Knowledge of Linguistic Constraint Violations?
summary:
Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve strong linguistic performance, yet their internal mechanisms for producing these predictions remain unclear. We investigate the hypothesis that LLMs encode representations of linguistic constraint violations within their parameters, which are selectively activated when processing ungrammatical sentences. To test this, we use sparse autoencoders to decompose polysemantic activations into sparse, monosemantic features and recover candidates for violation-related features.
  We introduce a sensitivity score for identifying features that are preferentially activated on constraint-violated versus well-formed inputs, enabling unsupervised detection of potential violation-specific features. We further propose a conjunctive falsification framework with three criteria evaluated jointly.
  Overall, the results are negative in two respects: (1) the falsification criteria are not jointly satisfied across linguistic phenomena, and (2) no features are consistently shared across all categories. While some phenomena show partial evidence of selective causal structure, the overall pattern provides limited support for a unified set of grammatical violation detectors in current LMs.

AI.tldr: 研究发现当前大型语言模型中不存在统一的语法违规检测机制，虽然某些现象显示出选择性因果结构的部分证据，但整体上不支持LLMs拥有统一的语法违规检测器假说。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在语言任务上表现优异，但产生这些预测的内部机制尚不明确。研究者旨在验证LLMs是否在参数中编码了语言约束违规的表征，并在处理不合语法句子时选择性地激活这些表征。
AI.method: 使用稀疏自编码器将多义激活分解为稀疏、单义的特征，提取潜在的违规相关特征；引入敏感性评分识别在违规输入上比合规范输入更优先激活的特征；提出了包含三个评估标准的联合证伪框架。
AI.result: 结果在两方面都是负面的：证伪标准无法在语言现象中联合满足，且没有特征在所有类别中 consistently 共享。虽然某些现象显示出选择性因果结构的部分证据，但整体模式对当前LLMs中存在统一的语法违规检测器集合提供了有限支持。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明当前的大型语言模型缺乏统一的语法违规检测机制，这为理解LLMs的语言处理能力提供了重要见解，也指出了未来研究中需要探索的方向。

title: The Midas Touch for Metric Depth
summary: Recent advances have markedly improved the cross-scene generalization of relative depth estimation, yet its practical applicability remains limited by the absence of metric scale, local inconsistencies, and low computational efficiency. To address these issues, we present \emph{\textbf{M}idas \textbf{T}ouch for \textbf{D}epth} (MTD), a mathematically interpretable approach that converts relative depth into metric depth using only extremely sparse 3D data. To eliminate local scale inconsistencies, it applies a segment-wise recovery strategy via sparse graph optimization, followed by a pixel-wise refinement strategy using a discontinuity-aware geodesic cost. MTD exhibits strong generalization and achieves substantial accuracy improvements over previous depth completion and depth estimation methods. Moreover, its lightweight, plug-and-play design facilitates deployment and integration on diverse downstream 3D tasks. Project page is available at https://mias.group/MTD.

AI.tldr: MTD是一种将相对深度转换为度量深度的方法，仅需极稀疏的3D数据，通过分段恢复策略和像素级精炼策略解决了尺度不一致等问题，具有强泛化性和高效率。
AI.motivation: 尽管相对深度估计的跨场景泛化能力已显著改善，但其缺乏度量尺度、存在局部不一致性以及计算效率较低等问题限制了其实际应用。
AI.method: MTD采用数学可解释的方法，仅使用极稀疏的3D数据将相对深度转换为度量深度。它通过稀疏图优化应用分段恢复策略消除局部尺度不一致，然后使用不连续感知的测地线成本进行像素级精炼。
AI.result: MTD展现出强大的泛化能力，在精度上大幅超越了以往的深度补全和深度估计方法。其轻量级、即插即用的设计便于在多样化的下游3D任务中部署和集成。
AI.conclusion: MTD通过创新的分段恢复和像素级精炼策略，有效解决了相对深度估计的关键局限性，为实际3D应用提供了高效、准确的度量深度解决方案。

title: Sign Language Recognition and Translation for Low-Resource Languages: Challenges and Pathways Forward
summary: Sign languages are natural, visual-gestural languages used by Deaf communities worldwide. Over 300 distinct sign languages remain severely low-resource due to limited documentation, sparse datasets, and insufficient computational tools. This systematic review synthesizes literature on sign language recognition and translation for under-resourced languages, using Azerbaijan Sign Language (AzSL) as a case study. Analysis of global initiatives extracts eight actionable lessons, including community co-design, dialectal diversity capture, and privacy-preserving pose-based representations. Turkic sign languages (Kazakh, Turkish, Azerbaijani) receive special attention, as linguistic proximity enables effective transfer learning. We propose three paradigm shifts: from architecture-centric to data-centric AI, from signer-independent to signer-adaptive systems, and from reference-based to task-specific evaluation metrics. A technical roadmap for AzSL leverages lightweight MediaPipe-based architectures, community-validated annotations, and offline-first deployment. Progress requires sustained interdisciplinary collaboration centered on Deaf communities to ensure cultural authenticity, ethical governance, and practical communication benefit.

AI.tldr: 本文系统性地回顾了低资源手语识别与翻译研究，以阿塞拜疆手语为例，提出了从架构中心转向数据中心、从说话者独立转向说话者自适应、从参考基准转向任务 specific 评估范式的三个范式转变，并制定了技术路线图。
AI.motivation: 全球300多种手语因文档有限、数据集稀疏、计算工具不足而严重低资源化，迫切需要系统性的解决方案来改善聋人群体的沟通状况。
AI.method: 通过系统性文献分析，提取八个经验教训；以突厥语系手语为重点，利用语言相似性实现跨语言迁移学习；采用MediaPipe轻量化架构、社区验证标注和离线优先部署策略。
AI.result: 提出了三个关键范式转变和针对阿塞拜疆手语的技术路线图，强调了以聋人社区为中心的跨学科合作对确保文化真实性和实际效益的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 构建实用且符合文化伦理的低资源手语系统需要持续的跨学科协作，技术创新必须与社区需求紧密结合，才能真正为聋人群体带来沟通便利。

title: A Mixture Autoregressive Image Generative Model on Quadtree Regions for Gaussian Noise Removal via Variational Bayes and Gradient Methods
summary: This paper addresses the problem of image denoising for grayscale images. We propose a probabilistic image generative model that combines a quadtree region-partitioning model with a mixture autoregressive model, and propose a framework that reduces MAP (maximum a posteriori)-estimation-based denoising to the maximization of a variational lower bound. To maximize this lower bound, we develop an algorithm that alternately applies variational Bayes and gradient methods. We particularly demonstrate that the gradient-based update rule can be computed analytically without numerical computation or approximation. We carried out some experiments to verify that the proposed algorithm actually removes image noise and to identify directions for future improvement.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于四叉树区域划分和混合自回归模型的概率生成模型，通过变分下界最大化框架实现灰度图像去噪。
AI.motivation: 针对灰度图像去噪问题，需要构建有效的图像生成模型和优化框架来提高去噪效果和计算效率。
AI.method: 结合四叉树区域划分模型与混合自回归模型构建概率生成模型，将MAP估计去噪转化为变分下界最大化问题，采用变分贝叶斯和梯度方法交替优化，梯度更新规则可解析计算。
AI.result: 实验验证了算法能够有效去除图像噪声，并明确了未来改进方向。
AI.conclusion: 提出的新型概率生成模型和变分优化框架为灰度图像去噪提供了有效解决方案，具有进一步优化潜力。

title: Metaphor Is Not All Attention Needs
summary: Large language models are increasingly deployed in safety-critical applications, where their ability to resist harmful instructions is essential. Although post-training aims to make models robust against many jailbreak strategies, recent evidence shows that stylistic reformulations, such as poetic transformation, can still bypass safety mechanisms with alarming effectiveness. This raises a central question: why do literary jailbreaks succeed? In this work, we investigate whether their effectiveness depends on specific poetic devices, on a failure to recognize literary formatting, or on deeper changes in how models process stylistically irregular prompts. We address this problem through an interpretability analysis of attention patterns. We perform input-level ablation studies to assess the contribution of individual and combinations of poetic devices; construct an interpretable vector representation of attention maps; cluster these representations and train linear probes to predict safety outcomes and literary format. Our results show that models distinguish poetic from prose formats with high accuracy, yet struggle to predict jailbreak success within each format. Clustering further reveals clear separation by literary format, but not by safety label. These findings indicate that jailbreak success is not caused by a failure to recognize poetic formatting; rather, poetic prompts induce distinct processing patterns that remain largely independent of harmful-content detection. Overall, literary jailbreaks appear to misalign large language models not through any single poetic device, but through accumulated stylistic irregularities that alter prompt processing and avoid lexical triggers considered during post-training. This suggests that robustness requires safety mechanisms that account for style-induced shifts in model behavior. We use Qwen3-14B as a representative open-weight case study.

AI.tldr: 文学性越狱通过累积的风格不规则性改变提示词处理方式，绕过安全机制，而非依赖单一修辞手法。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在安全关键应用中部署，但研究发现即使经过后训练安全对齐，诗歌等文学性转换仍能有效绕过安全防护，这一现象的根本原因尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过注意力模式的可解释性分析，进行输入级消融研究评估单个及组合修辞手法的贡献，构建注意力图谱的可解释向量表示，进行聚类分析并训练线性探针预测安全结果和文学格式。
AI.result: 模型能高精度识别诗歌与散文格式，但在同一格式内难以预测越狱成功；聚类显示文学格式明确分离，但安全标签无明显分离。文学性越狱并非由于格式识别失败，而是由风格不规则性累积引起的处理模式改变。
AI.conclusion: 文学性越狱通过风格不规则性的累积改变提示词处理，避开后训练中考虑的词汇触发器。需要建立考虑风格引起的行为偏移的安全机制来增强模型鲁棒性。

title: Logit-Attention Divergence: Mitigating Position Bias in Multi-Image Retrieval via Attention-Guided Calibration
summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have shown strong performance in multi-image cross-modal retrieval, yet suffer from severe position bias, where predictions are dominated by input order rather than semantic relevance. Through empirical analysis, we identify a phenomenon termed Logit-Attention Divergence, in which output logits are heavily biased while internal attention maps remain well-aligned with relevant visual evidence. This observation reveals a fundamental limitation of existing logit-level calibration methods such as PriDe. Based on this insight, we propose a training-free, attention-guided debiasing framework that leverages intrinsic attention signals for instance-level correction at inference time, requiring only a minimal calibration set with negligible computational overhead. Experiments on MS-COCO-based benchmarks show that our method substantially improves permutation invariance and achieves state-of-the-art performance, enhancing accuracy by over 40\% compared to baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/brightXian/LAD.

AI.tldr: 本文发现多模态大语言模型存在显著位置偏差，提出了一种基于注意力引导的训练无关去偏方法，显著提升了模型对输入顺序的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在多图像跨模态检索任务中虽然表现良好，但存在严重的位置偏差问题，即预测结果主要受输入顺序影响而非语义相关性，这限制了模型的实际应用价值。
AI.method: 通过实证分析发现了Logit-Attention Divergence现象，即输出logit严重偏离而内部注意力图依然与相关视觉证据对齐。基于此发现，提出了一个训练免费的注意力引导去偏框架，在推理时利用内在注意力信号进行实例级校正，仅需最小化的校准集且计算开销可忽略。
AI.result: 在基于MS-COCO的基准测试中，该方法显著提升了排列不变性，相比基线模型准确率提升超过40%，达到了最先进的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了现有logit级校准方法的根本局限性，提出的注意力引导去偏框架为解决MLLM位置偏差问题提供了有效且实用的解决方案，为多模态模型的鲁棒性提升开辟了新的研究方向。

title: Latent Causal Void: Explicit Missing-Context Reconstruction for Misinformation Detection
summary: Automatic misinformation detection performs well when deception is visible in what an article explicitly states. However, some misinformation articles remain locally coherent and only become misleading once compared with contemporaneous reports that supply background facts the article omits. We study this omission-relevant setting and observe that current omission-aware approaches typically either attach retrieved context as auxiliary evidence or infer a categorical omission signal, leaving the specific missing fact implicit. We propose \emph{Latent Causal Void} (LCV), a retrieval-guided detector that explicitly reconstructs the missing fact for each target sentence and uses it as a textual cross-source relation in graph reasoning. Concretely, LCV retrieves temporally aligned context articles, asks a frozen instruction-tuned large language model to generate a short missing-context description for each sentence--article pair, and feeds the resulting relation text into a heterograph over target sentences and context articles. On the bilingual benchmark of Sheng et al., LCV improves over the strongest omission-aware baseline by $2.56$ and $2.84$ macro-F1 points on the English and Chinese splits, respectively. The results indicate that modeling the missing cross-source fact itself, rather than only attaching retrieved evidence or predicting an omission signal, is a useful representation for omission-aware misinformation detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LCV方法，通过显式重构缺失事实来进行遗漏相关的不实信息检测，在英文和中文数据集上分别提升了2.56和2.84个macro-F1点。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理局部连贯但通过遗漏关键信息造成误导的文章时效果不佳，当前方法要么只是附加上下文作为辅助证据，要么预测分类的遗漏信号，未能明确识别具体缺失的事实。
AI.method: LCV检索时间对齐的上下文文章，使用冻结的指令调优大语言模型为每个句子-文章对生成缺失的上下文描述，并将结果文本作为跨源关系输入到包含目标句子和上下文文章的异构图进行推理。
AI.result: 在Sheng等人的双语基准测试中，LCV相比最强的遗漏感知基线，英文和中文数据集分别提升2.56和2.84个macro-F1点。
AI.conclusion: 建模缺失的跨源事实本身，而非仅仅附加检索证据或预测遗漏信号，是遗漏感知不实信息检测的有效表示方法。

title: PointForward: Feedforward Driving Reconstruction through Point-Aligned Representations
summary: High-fidelity reconstruction of driving scenes is crucial for autonomous driving. While recent feedforward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) methods enable fast reconstruction, their per-pixel Gaussian prediction paradigm often suffers from multi-view inconsistency and layering artifacts. Moreover, existing methods often model dynamic instances via dense flow prediction, which lacks explicit cross-view correspondence and instance-level consistency. In this paper, we propose PointForward, a feedforward driving reconstruction framework through point-aligned representations. Unlike pixel-aligned methods, we initialize sparse 3D queries in world space and aggregate multi-view image information via spatial-temporal fusion onto these queries, enforcing explicit cross-view consistency in a single feedforward pass. To handle scene dynamics, we introduce scene graphs that explicitly organize moving instances during reconstruction. By leveraging 3D bounding boxes, our method enables instance-level motion propagation and temporally consistent dynamic representations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PointForward achieves state-of-the-art performance on large-scale driving benchmarks. The code will be available upon the publication of the paper.

AI.tldr: PointForward是一种通过点对齐表示的前向传播驾驶场景重建框架，解决了现有3D高斯泼溅方法的多视角不一致和动态物体处理问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的前向3D高斯泼溅方法存在多视角不一致和分层伪影问题，同时通过密集流预测处理动态实例缺乏显式的跨视角对应关系和实例级一致性，这些限制影响了自动驾驶场景的高保真重建。
AI.method: 提出PointForward框架，在世界空间中初始化稀疏3D查询点，通过时空融合将多视图图像信息聚合到这些查询点上，强制实现单次前向传播的显式跨视角一致性。引入场景图显式组织运动实例，利用3D边界框实现实例级运动传播和时间一致的动态表示。
AI.result: 在大型驾驶基准测试上实现了最先进的性能，验证了该方法在驾驶场景重建中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过点对齐表示和场景图组织，PointForward成功解决了现有方法在多视角一致性和动态实例处理方面的不足，为自动驾驶场景重建提供了新的解决方案。

title: Correcting Selection Bias in Sparse User Feedback for Large Language Model Quality Estimation: A Multi-Agent Hierarchical Bayesian Approach
summary: [Abridged] Production LLM deployments receive feedback from a non-random fraction of users: thumbs sit mostly in the tails of the satisfaction distribution, and a naive average over them can land 40-50 percentage points away from true system quality. We treat this as a topic- and sentiment- stratified selection-bias problem and propose a three-agent hierarchical Bayesian pipeline that does not require ground-truth labels on individual interactions. A Topic Clustering Agent partitions the stream via UMAP + HDBSCAN over text embeddings; a Bias Modeling Agent fits a two-stage hierarchical Beta-Binomial under NUTS, inferring per-topic selection rates $s_c$ and quality $q_c$ with partial pooling; a Synthesis Agent reweights $q_c$ by true topic prevalence $\hatπ_c = n_c/N$ to report a bias-corrected aggregate posterior $\bar Q = \sum_c \hatπ_c q_c$ with credible interval, plus drift signals for online recalibration. Validation uses UltraFeedback (N=10,232 retained interactions, $C=18$ clusters, $Q^\star=0.6249$) with simulated topic- and sentiment-dependent selection biases. We compare five Bayesian variants against Naive and IPW baselines. A mild prior on the feedback channel (typical positive-feedback rate and negative-to-positive ratio, both readable from any production dashboard without labels) keeps Hierarchical-Informed within 4-13 pp of $Q^\star$ as the bias ratio sweeps from 1:1 to 30:1, with 95% credible intervals covering $Q^\star$ in 50/50 random-seed replicates at $κ_{\max}=10$. Without channel-side priors, every weak-prior variant misses $Q^\star$ by 22-33 pp: the per-cluster sufficient statistics admit a one-parameter family of equally good fits, and the prior on the bias channel (not on latent quality) is what breaks the degeneracy.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一个三层级贝叶斯管道来解决大语言模型生产部署中的选择偏差问题，能够在不需要个体交互真实标签的情况下，将用户反馈平均误差从40-50个百分点降低到4-13个百分点。
AI.motivation: 生产环境中的大语言模型部署接收到的用户反馈存在严重的选择偏差—— thumbs-up/down 主要来自满意度分布的尾部，对这些反馈的简单平均会导致对系统真实质量的评估偏差高达40-50个百分点。
AI.method: 提出了一个三层级贝叶斯框架：1) 主题聚类代理使用UMAP+HDBSCAN对文本嵌入进行聚类；2) 偏差建模代理使用两层级Beta-Binomial模型拟合每个主题的选择率sc和质量qc；3) 综合代理根据真实主题 prevalences 重新加权qc，输出偏差校正的聚合后验分布。
AI.result: 在UltraFeedback数据集上的验证显示，引入反馈渠道先验信息的方法能在偏差比例从1:1到30:1变化时，将误差控制在4-13个百分点范围内，95%置信区间覆盖真实质量值。没有渠道先验的方法误差仍高达22-33个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 选择偏差的矫正关键在于引入反馈渠道的先验信息（而非潜在质量先验），这打破了模型拟合的退化性。提出的框架能够有效处理主题和情感分层的选择偏差，为生产环境LLM系统提供可靠的质量评估和在线校准信号。

title: HorizonDrive: Self-Corrective Autoregressive World Model for Long-horizon Driving Simulation
summary: Closed-loop driving simulation requires real-time interaction beyond short offline clips, pushing current driving world models toward autoregressive (AR) rollout. Existing AR distillation approaches typically rely on frame sinks or student-side degradation training. The former transfers poorly to driving due to fast ego-motion and rapid scene changes, while the latter remains bounded by the teacher's single-pass output length and thus provides only a limited supervision horizon. A natural question is: can the teacher itself be extended via AR rollout to provide unbounded-horizon supervision at bounded memory cost? The key difficulty is that a standard teacher drifts under its own predictions, contaminating the supervision it provides. Our key insight is to make the teacher rollout-capable, ensuring reliable supervision from its own AR rollouts. This is instantiated as HorizonDrive, an anti-drifting training-and-distillation framework for AR driving simulation. First, scheduled rollout recovery (SRR) trains the base model to reconstruct ground-truth future clips from prediction-corrupted histories, yielding a teacher that remains stable across long AR rollouts. Second, the rollout-capable teacher is extended via AR rollout, providing long-horizon distribution-matching supervision under bounded memory, while a short-window student aligns to it with teacher rollout DMD (TRD) for efficient real-time deployment. HorizonDrive natively supports minute-scale AR rollout under bounded memory; on nuScenes, HorizonDrive reduces FID by 52% and FVD by 37%, and lowers ARE and DTW by 21% and 9% relative to the strongest long-horizon streaming baselines, while remaining competitive with single-pass driving video generators.

AI.tldr: HorizonDrive是一个抗漂移的驾驶仿真框架，通过让教师模型具备自回归展开能力，实现了有界内存下的无限时程监督，在分钟级驾驶仿真中显著提升生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有的自回归蒸馏方法在驾驶场景中存在局限性：帧汇聚方法因快速自运动和场景变化而迁移效果差，而学生侧退化训练受限于教师的单次输出长度，只能提供有限的监督时程。
AI.method: HorizonDrive包含两个关键技术：1) 调度展开恢复(SRR)训练基础模型从预测损坏的历史中重建真实未来片段，获得在长距离自回归展开中保持稳定的教师模型；2) 通过自回归展开扩展教师模型，在bounded memory下提供长时程分布匹配监督，学生通过教师展开DMD(TRD)进行对齐。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，HorizonDrive在minute-scale自回归展开下，FID降低52%，FVD降低37%，ARE和DTW分别降低21%和9%，同时与单次驾驶视频生成器保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: HorizonDrive成功解决了教师模型在自回归展开中的漂移问题，实现了无需帧汇聚的长时程监督，为实时闭环驾驶仿真提供了有效解决方案。

title: Mitigating Context-Memory Conflicts in LLMs through Dynamic Cognitive Reconciliation Decoding
summary: Large language models accumulate extensive parametric knowledge through pre-training. However, knowledge conflicts occur when outdated or incorrect parametric knowledge conflicts with external knowledge in the context. Existing methods address knowledge conflicts through contrastive decoding, but in conflict-free scenarios, static approaches disrupt output distribution. Other dynamic decoding methods attempt to measure the degree of conflict but still struggle with complex real-world situations. In this paper, we propose a two-stage decoding method called Dynamic Cognitive Reconciliation Decoding (DCRD), to predict and mitigate context-memory conflicts. DCRD first analyzes the attention map to assess context fidelity and predict potential conflicts. Based on this prediction, the input is directed to one of two decoding paths: (1) greedy decoding, or (2) context fidelity-based dynamic decoding. This design enables DCRD to handle conflicts efficiently while maintaining high accuracy and decoding efficiency in conflict-free cases. Additionally, to simulate scenarios with frequent knowledge updates, we constructed ConflictKG, a knowledge conflict QA benchmark. Experiments on four LLMs across six QA datasets show that DCRD outperforms all baselines, achieving state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: DCRD是一种两阶段解码方法，通过分析注意力图预测知识冲突，并动态选择贪婪解码或基于上下文保真度的解码，在处理知识冲突的同时保持冲突无关情况下的效率。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在预训练中积累大量参数化知识，但当过时或错误的参数化知识与上下文中的外部知识发生冲突时，现有方法要么在无冲突场景下破坏输出分布，要么在复杂现实情况中冲突检测准确率不足。
AI.method: 提出动态认知和解码(DCRD)两阶段方法：首先通过分析注意力图评估上下文保真度来预测潜在冲突；然后基于预测结果选择贪婪解码路径或基于上下文保真度的动态解码路径。
AI.result: 在四个LLM和六个QA数据集上的实验表明，DCRD超越了所有基线方法，达到了最先进的性能。同时构建了模拟频繁知识更新场景的ConflictKG冲突知识QA基准。
AI.conclusion: DCRD成功实现了知识冲突的高效处理，同时在无冲突情况下保持了高准确性和解码效率，为解决大模型知识冲突问题提供了有效方案。

title: Keep What Audio Cannot Say: Context-Preserving Token Pruning for Omni-LLMs
summary: Omnimodal Large Language Models (Omni-LLMs) incur substantial computational overhead due to the large number of multimodal input tokens they process, making token reduction essential for real-world deployment. Existing Omni-LLM pruning methods typically reduce this cost by selecting tokens that are important for the current query or strongly aligned with cross-modal cues. However, such strategies can discard evidence that falls outside these criteria, even when needed for different questions or for understanding context beyond aligned audio-visual cues. To address this limitation, we reframe Omni-LLM token reduction as preserving broad audio-visual context while removing cross-modal redundancy. We propose ContextGuard, an inference-time token pruning framework built on this principle. ContextGuard predicts coarse visual semantics from audio and prunes video tokens whose coarse semantics are likely recoverable from audio, while retaining additional video tokens to preserve localized visual details that audio alone cannot specify. For further compression, our method merges temporally similar video tokens. The framework requires no downstream LLM fine-tuning and uses only an independently trained lightweight predictor. On Qwen2.5-Omni and Video-SALMONN2+ at 3B and 7B scales across six audio-visual benchmarks, ContextGuard outperforms prior inference-time pruning methods while pruning more tokens. Notably, on Qwen2.5-Omni 7B, ContextGuard achieves full-token-level performance on five of six benchmarks while pruning 55% of input tokens.

AI.tldr: ContextGuard是一种推理时token剪枝框架，通过保留广泛视听上下文同时移除跨模态冗余，显著降低Omni-LLMs计算开销，无需下游模型微调。
AI.motivation: 现有Omni-LLMs的token剪枝方法主要关注当前查询重要性或跨模态对齐度，可能丢弃对其他问题必要的证据，限制了模型的上下文理解能力。
AI.method: ContextGuard通过从音频预测粗粒度视觉语义，剪枝可从音频恢复的视频token，同时保留音频无法指定的局部视觉细节token，并合并时间相似的video tokens，使用独立训练的轻量级预测器实现。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-Omni和Video-SALMONN2+的3B和7B模型上，ContextGuard在六个视听基准测试中超越现有推理时剪枝方法，其中Qwen2.5-Omni 7B在剪枝55%输入token的情况下，在五个基准测试中达到全token级别性能。
AI.conclusion: ContextGuard成功解决了现有方法的问题，通过保留广泛上下文而非仅关注特定查询，实现了更高效率的token剪枝，为Omni-LLMs的实际部署提供了有效解决方案。

title: Mechanistic Interpretability of ASR models using Sparse Autoencoders
summary: Understanding the internal machinations of deep Transformer-based NLP models is more crucial than ever as these models see widespread use in various domains that affect the public at large, such as industry, academia, finance, health. While these models have advanced rapidly, their internal mechanisms remain largely a mystery. Techniques such as Sparse Autoencoders (SAE) have emerged to understand these mechanisms by projecting dense representations into a sparse vector. While existing research has demonstrated the viability of the SAE in interpreting text-based Large Language Models (LLMs), there are no equivalent studies that demonstrate the application of a SAE to audio processing models like Automatic Speech Recognizers (ASRs). In this work, a SAE is applied to Whisper, a Transformer-based ASR, training a high-dimensional sparse latent space on frame-level embeddings extracted from the Whisper encoder. Our work uncovers diverse monosemantic features across linguistic and non-linguistic boundaries, and demonstrates cross-lingual feature steering. This work establishes the viability of a SAE model and demonstrates that Whisper encodes a rich amount of linguistic information.

AI.tldr: 本研究首次将稀疏自编码器(SAE)应用于Whisper自动语音识别模型，揭示了模型中多样化的单语义特征，证明了该技术在音频模型解释方面的可行性。
AI.motivation: 虽然基于Transformer的NLP模型广泛应用，但其内部机制仍不透明。现有SAE技术已成功用于解释文本大语言模型，但在音频处理领域如自动语音识别(ASR)模型上缺乏相应研究，这阻碍了我们对音频模型内部工作机制的理解。
AI.method: 作者将稀疏自编码器应用于Whisper这一基于Transformer的ASR模型，在Whisper编码器提取的帧级嵌入上训练高维稀疏潜空间，通过这种投影方式揭示模型的内部表示。
AI.result: 研究发现了跨语言和非语言边界的多样化单语义特征，并展示了跨语言特征引导能力，证实了Whisper编码了丰富的语言信息。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作确立了SAE模型在音频模型解释中的可行性，证明了Whisper内部蕴含丰富的语言信息，为理解ASR等音频处理模型的内部机制开辟了新的研究路径。

title: Grounding by Remembering: Cross-Scene and In-Scene Memory for 3D Functional Affordances
summary: Functional affordance grounding requires more than recognizing an object: an agent must localize the specific region that supports an interaction, such as the handle to pull or the button to press. This is difficult for training-free vision-language pipelines because actionable regions are often small, visually ambiguous, and repeated across multiple same-category instances in a scene. We propose AFFORDMEM, a framework that grounds 3D functional affordances by remembering geometry at two levels. The first is cross-scene affordance memory: the agent maintains a category-level memory bank of RGB images with affordance regions rendered as overlays, and recalls the most informative examples at query time to guide a frozen VLM toward small operable subregions that text-only prompting consistently misses. The second is in-scene spatial memory: as the agent processes the scene, it organizes candidate instances and their 3D spatial relations into a structured scene graph, enabling the language model to resolve references over distant or currently unobserved candidates such as "the second handle from the top." AFFORDMEM requires no model fine-tuning and no target-scene annotation, using a reusable memory bank built from source scenes. On SceneFun3D, our method improves AP50 over the prior training-free state of the art by 3.23 on Split 0 and 3.7 on Split 1. Ablation studies support complementary benefits: cross-scene affordance memory improves fine-grained localization, while in-scene spatial memory provides the larger gain on spatially qualified queries. The project homepage is available at the project page.

AI.tldr: AFFORDMEM是一个无需微调的3D功能可用性定位框架，通过跨场景和场景内两层记忆机制来精确定位物体可操作区域。
AI.motivation: 现有的免训练视觉语言管道在功能可用性定位上存在困难，因为可操作区域通常很小、视觉上模糊不清，且在同一场景的多个同类实例中重复出现，导致通过纯文本提示难以精确定位。
AI.method: AFFORDMEM框架采用双层记忆机制：1) 跨场景可用性记忆，维护带有可用性区域覆盖的RGB图像的类别级记忆库，在查询时召回最有信息量的示例来引导冻结的VLM定位小型可操作子区域；2) 场景内空间记忆，将候选实例及其3D空间关系组织成结构化场景图，使语言模型能够解决对远距离或当前未观察到的候选对象的引用。
AI.result: 在SceneFun3D数据集上，该方法相比之前的免训练最优方法在Split 0上提升了3.23 AP50，在Split 1上提升了3.7 AP50。消融实验证明两种记忆机制的互补效益：跨场景记忆改善细粒度定位，场景内空间记忆在空间限定查询上提供更大增益。
AI.conclusion: AFFORDMEM通过引入记忆机制成功解决了免训练框架中功能可用性定位的挑战，无需模型微调或目标场景标注，具有很好的实用性和可扩展性。

title: Combining On-Policy Optimization and Distillation for Long-Context Reasoning in Large Language Models
summary: Adapting large language models (LLMs) to long-context tasks requires post-training methods that remain accurate and coherent over thousands of tokens. Existing approaches are limited in several ways: 1) off-policy methods such as supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and knowledge distillation (KD) suffer from exposure bias and limited recovery from model-generated errors over long horizons; 2) on-policy reinforcement learning methods such as Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) better align training with model-generated states, but are unstable and sample-inefficient due to sparse rewards; 3) on-policy distillation (OPD) provides dense token-level guidance, but does not directly optimize arbitrary reward signals. In this paper, we propose Distilled Group Relative Policy Optimization (dGRPO), a method for long-context reasoning that augments GRPO with dense guidance from a stronger teacher via OPD. We also introduce LongBlocks, a synthetic long-context dataset spanning multi-hop reasoning, contextual grounding, and long-form generation. We conduct extensive experiments and ablations comparing off-policy training, sparse-reward GRPO, and our combined approach, leading to an improved recipe for long-context alignment. Overall, our results show that combining outcome-based policy optimization with knowledge distillation in a single objective provides a more stable and effective path to long-context reasoning, while preserving short-context capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出dGRPO方法，结合群体相对策略优化(GRPO)和在线策略蒸馏(OPD)来解决长上下文语言模型训练问题，并通过合成数据集LongBlocks验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有长上下文适应方法存在局限：离线方法(SFT、KD)存在暴露偏差；在线强化学习(GRPO)不稳定且样本效率低；在线蒸馏(OPD)无法直接优化任意奖励信号。
AI.method: 提出蒸馏群体相对策略优化(dGRPO)：将GRPO与教师模型的密集指导结合；引入LongBlocks合成数据集，涵盖多跳推理、上下文基础和长文本生成任务。
AI.result: 实验结果表明dGRPO相比现有方法更稳定有效，在长上下文推理任务上表现提升，同时保持了短文本能力。
AI.conclusion: 将基于结果的策略优化与知识蒸馏结合在单目标中，为长上下文推理提供了更稳定有效的解决方案，突破了现有方法的限制。

title: RNA-FM: Flow-Matching Generative Model for Genome-wide RNA-Seq Prediction
comment: 15 pages, 13 tables, 3 figures. Accepted by the Forty-Third International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML2026). Code is available at https://github.com/YXSong000/RNA-FM
summary: Histopathology whole-slide images (WSIs) are routinely acquired in clinical practice and contain rich tissue morphology but lack direct molecular architecture and functional programs defining pathological states, whereas RNA sequencing (RNA-seq) provides genome-wide transcriptional profiles at substantial cost, thereby motivating WSI-based genome-wide transcriptomic prediction. Existing approaches for predicting gene expression from WSIs predominantly rely on deterministic regression with one-to-one mapping, limiting their ability to capture biological heterogeneity and predictive uncertainty. We propose RNA-FM, a flow-matching generative framework for genome-wide bulk RNA-seq prediction from WSIs. RNA-FM formulates transcriptomic prediction as a continuous-time conditional transport problem, learning a velocity field that maps a simple prior to the target gene expression distribution conditioned on morphologies. By integrating pathway-level structure, RNA-FM enables scalable and biologically interpretable genome-wide gene expression imputation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RNA-FM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art approaches while maintaining biological meaningfulness. Code is available at https://github.com/YXSong000/RNA-FM.

AI.tldr: RNA-FM是一种基于流匹配生成框架的创新方法，能够从组织病理学全切片图像准确预测全基因组范围的表达谱，并通过整合通路结构实现了可扩展性和生物学可解释性。
AI.motivation: 组织病理学WSI图像包含丰富的组织形态信息但缺乏分子架构信息，而RNA测序能提供全基因组转录谱但成本高昂。现有的确定性回归方法无法捕获生物学异质性和预测不确定性，限制了其实际应用价值。
AI.method: RNA-FM将转录组预测构建为连续时间条件输运问题，学习一个从简单先验分布到目标基因表达分布的速度场，该映射以WSI形态为条件。通过整合通路水平结构，实现了可扩展和生物学可解释的基因组范围基因表达插补。
AI.result: 大量实验证明RNA-FM在保持生物学意义的同时，持续优于现有最先进方法，为WSI到RNA-seq的预测提供了更准确可靠的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为从组织病理学图像预测分子表型提供了新的范式，通过生成式方法克服了确定性回归的局限性，为临床实践中经济高效地获取转录组信息开辟了新途径。

title: Mind the Pause: Disfluency-Aware Objective Tuning for Multilingual Speech Correction with LLMs
summary: Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) transcripts often contain disfluencies, such as fillers, repetitions, and false starts, which reduce readability and hinder downstream applications like chatbots and voice assistants. If left unaddressed, such disfluencies can significantly degrade the reliability of downstream systems. Most existing approaches rely on classical models that focus on identifying disfluent tokens for removal. While this strategy is effective to some extent, it often disrupts grammatical structure and semantic coherence, leading to incomplete or unnatural sentences. Recent literature explored the use of large language models (LLMs); however, these efforts have primarily focused on disfluency detection or data augmentation, rather than performing comprehensive correction. We propose a multilingual correction pipeline where a sequence tagger first marks disfluent tokens, and these signals guide instruction fine-tuning of an LLM to rewrite transcripts into fluent text. To further improve reliability, we add a contrastive learning objective that penalizes the reproduction of disfluent tokens, encouraging the model to preserve grammar and meaning while removing disfluent artifacts. Our experiments across three Indian languages, namely Hindi, Bengali, and Marathi show consistent improvements over strong baselines, including multilingual sequence-to-sequence models. These results highlight that detection-only strategies are insufficient. Combining token-level cues with instruction tuning and contrastive learning provides a practical and scalable solution for multilingual disfluency correction in speech-driven NLP systems. We make the codes publicly available at https://github.com/deepak-kumar-98/Mind-the-Pause.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多语言文本修正流水线，结合序列标注器标记停顿填充词，通过指令微调大语言模型进行文本重写，并引入对比学习提高修正可靠性。
AI.motivation: 自动语音识别转录文本中常包含填充词、重复和错误开始等不流利现象，影响文本可读性和下游应用性能。现有方法主要关注识别和删除不流利标记，但会破坏语法结构和语义连贯性。
AI.method: 构建多语言修正流水线：1）序列标注器标记不流利标记；2）基于标记信号指导大语言模型的指令微调；3）添加对比学习目标惩罚不流利标记的重现，保持语法和语义。
AI.result: 在印地语、孟加拉语和马拉地语三种印度语言的实验中，该方法持续优于强基线模型，包括多语言序列到序列模型。
AI.conclusion: 仅依赖检测策略不足以处理不流利问题。结合标记级信号与指令微调和对比学习为语音驱动的NLP系统中的多语言不流利修正提供了实用且可扩展的解决方案。

title: Single-Shot HDR Recovery via a Video Diffusion Prior
summary: Recent generative methods for single-shot high dynamic range (HDR) image reconstruction show promising results, but often struggle with preserving fidelity to the input image. They require separate models to handle highlights and shadows, or sacrifice interpretability by directly predicting the final HDR image. We address these limitations by re-casting single-shot HDR reconstruction as conditional video generation and fusing the generated frames into an HDR image. We finetune a video diffusion model to generate an exposure bracket, conditioned on a low dynamic range (LDR) input. We fuse this image bracket using per-pixel weights predicted by a light-weight UNet. This formulation is simple, interpretable, and effective. Rather than directly hallucinating an HDR image, it explicitly reconstructs the intermediate exposure stack and fuses it into the final output. Our method eliminates the need for separate models across exposure regimes and produces HDR reconstructions with high input fidelity. On quantitative benchmarks, we outperform state-of-the-art generative baselines with comparable model capacity on several reconstruction metrics. Human evaluators further prefer our results in 72% of pairwise comparisons against existing methods. Finally, we show that this input-conditioned sequence generation and fusion framework extends beyond HDR to other image reconstruction tasks, such as all-in-focus image recovery from a single defocus-blurred input.

AI.tldr: 本文将单次HDR重建重构为条件视频生成问题，通过微调视频扩散模型生成曝光序列，然后用轻量级UNet预测的像素权重融合，既保持了输入保真度又提高了质量。
AI.motivation: 现有的单次HDR生成方法在保持输入图像保真度方面存在困难，需要分别处理高光和阴影的不同模型，或者直接预测最终HDR图像而牺牲了可解释性。
AI.method: 将单次HDR重建重新表述为条件视频生成，微调视频扩散模型根据LDR输入生成曝光序列，使用轻量级UNet预测的像素权重将这些帧融合为HDR图像。
AI.result: 在定量基准测试中，以相当的模型容量在多个重建指标上优于最先进的生成基线，在人工评估中72%的比较中偏好本方法结果，并成功扩展到全焦图像恢复等其他重建任务。
AI.conclusion: 这种条件序列生成和融合框架简单、可解释且有效，消除了不同曝光 regimes 中对分离模型的需求，同时产生高输入保真度的HDR重建，具有良好的通用性。

title: PreScam: A Benchmark for Predicting Scam Progression from Early Conversations
summary: Conversational scams, such as romance and investment scams, are emerging as a major form of online fraud. Unlike one-shot scam lures such as fake lottery or unpaid toll messages, they unfold through multi-turn conversations in which scammers gradually manipulate victims using evolving psychological techniques. However, existing research mainly focuses on static scam detection or synthetic scams, leaving open whether language models can understand how real-world scams progress over time. We introduce PreScam, a benchmark for modeling scam progression from early conversations. Built from user-submitted scam reports, PreScam filters and structures 177,989 raw reports into 11,573 conversational scam instances spanning 20 scam categories. Each instance is hierarchically structured according to the scam lifecycle defined by the proposed scam kill chain, and further annotated at the turn level with scammer psychological actions and victim responses. We benchmark models on two tasks: real-time termination prediction, which estimates whether a conversation is approaching the termination stage, and scammer action prediction, which forecasts the scammer's subsequent actions. Results show a clear gap between surface-level fluency and progression modeling: supervised encoders substantially outperform zero-shot LLMs on real-time termination prediction, while next-action prediction remains only moderately successful even for strong LLMs. Taken together, these results show that current models can capture some scam-related cues, yet still struggle to track how risk escalates and how manipulation unfolds across turns.

AI.tldr: 这项研究提出了PreScam基准数据集，用于检测和理解现实世界中对话式诈骗的进展过程，发现现有模型在追踪诈骗风险升级和操控手段方面仍存在显著缺陷。
AI.motivation: 对话式诈骗如恋爱和投资诈骗正在成为主要的在线欺诈形式，与一次性诈骗不同，它们通过多轮对话展开，诈骗者使用不断演变的心理技巧逐步操控受害者。现有研究主要关注静态诈骗检测或合成诈骗，无法理解真实世界诈骗如何随时间发展。
AI.method: 构建PreScam基准数据集，从177,989份原始诈骗报告中筛选并结构化出11,573个对话式诈骗实例，涵盖20个诈骗类别。根据 propose 的诈骗生命周期 kill chain 进行层次化结构化，并在对话轮次层面标注诈骗者心理行为和受害者反应。设计了两个评测任务：实时终止预测和诈骗者行为预测。
AI.result: 监督编码器在实时终止预测任务上明显优于零样本LLM，而即使是强大的LLM在下一步行为预测上也仅取得中等成功。这表明模型虽然能捕捉到某些诈骗相关线索，但在追踪风险升级和操控展开方面仍存在困难。
AI.conclusion: 当前模型在表面语言流畅性和诈骗进展建模之间存在明显差距，需要进一步研究来提高对诈骗过程动态变化的理解能力。

title: Unlocking UML Class Diagram Understanding in Vision Language Models
summary: Although Vision Language Models (VLMs) have seen tremendous progress across all kinds of use cases, they still fall behind in answering questions regard-ing diagrams compared to photos. Although progress has been made in the area of bar charts, line charts and other diagrams like that there is still few research concerned with other types of diagrams, e.g. in the computer science domain. Our work presents a benchmark for visual question answering based on UML class diagrams which is both challenging and manageable. We further construct a large-scale training dataset with 16.000 image-question-answer triples and show that a LoRA-based finetune easily outperforms Qwen 3.5 27B, which is a recent and well-performing VLM in many other benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一个基于UML类图的视觉问答基准测试，构建了包含16,000个样本的训练数据集，并证明LoRA微调方法在UML问答任务上显著优于Qwen 3.5 27B模型。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉语言模型在处理图表问答任务时表现不佳，特别是在计算机科学领域的UML类图等非传统图表类型上，相关研究很少，需要专门的基准测试和训练数据。
AI.method: 研究人员创建了一个针对UML类图的视觉问答基准测试，构建了大规模训练数据集（16,000个图像-问题-答案三元组），并采用LoRA方法对模型进行微调。
AI.result: LoRA微调的模型在UML类图问答任务上轻松超越了Qwen 3.5 27B这一在许多其他基准测试中表现优异的视觉语言模型。
AI.conclusion: 该工作填补了UML类图视觉问答研究的空白，证明了专门针对该领域进行微调的有效性，为计算机科学领域的图表理解提供了新的解决方案。

title: PRISM: Pareto-Efficient Retrieval over Intent-Aware Structured Memory for Long-Horizon Agents
summary: Long-horizon language agents accumulate conversation history far faster than any fixed context window can hold, making memory management critical to both answer accuracy and serving cost. Existing approaches either expand the context window without addressing what is retrieved, perform heavy ingestion-time fact extraction at substantial token cost, or rely on heuristic graph traversal that leaves both accuracy and efficiency on the table. We present PRISM, a training-free retrieval-side framework that treats long-horizon memory as a joint retrieval-and-compression problem over a graph-structured memory. PRISM combines four orthogonal inference-time components: Hierarchical Bundle Search over typed relation paths, Query-Sensitive Edge Costing that aligns traversal with detected query intent, Evidence Compression that compresses the candidate bundle into a compact answer-side context, and Adaptive Intent Routing that routes most queries through zero-LLM tiers. By formulating retrieval as min-cost selection over typed path templates and pairing it with an LLM-side compression step, PRISM surfaces the right evidence under a strict context budget without any fine-tuning or modification to the upstream ingestion pipeline. Experiments on the LoCoMo benchmark show that PRISM delivers substantially higher LLM-judge accuracy than every same-protocol baseline at an order-of-magnitude smaller context budget, occupying a previously empty corner of the accuracy-context-cost frontier and demonstrating a superior balance between answer quality and retrieval efficiency.

AI.tldr: PRISM是一个无需训练的检索框架，将长期内存管理视为图结构内存上的联合检索与压缩问题，通过分层路径搜索、查询敏感边代价、证据压缩和自适应意图路由四个组件，在严格上下文预算下实现高精度记忆检索。
AI.motivation: 长期语言代理会快速积累对话历史，超出现有固定上下文窗口的处理能力，传统的内存管理方法存在上下文窗口扩展不足、提取成本高昂、启发式图遍历导致准确性和效率低下等问题。
AI.method: PRISM框架包含四个正交的推理时组件：1) 分层束搜索在类型化关系路径上进行；2) 查询敏感边代价使遍历与查询意图对齐；3) 证据压缩将候选束压缩为紧凑的答案侧上下文；4) 自适应意图路由让大多数查询通过零LLM层处理。
AI.result: 在LoCoMo基准测试上，PRISM比所有相同协议的基线方法实现了显著更高的LLM判断准确率，且上下文预算小一个数量级，在准确率-上下文-成本边界上占据了新的最优位置。
AI.conclusion: PRISM通过将检索表述为类型化路径模板上的最小代价选择，并配以LLM侧压缩步骤，在无需微调或修改上游提取管道的情况下，在严格上下文预算内提供了正确的证据，实现了答案质量和检索效率的卓越平衡。

title: Hide to See: Reasoning-prefix Masking for Visual-anchored Thinking in VLM Distillation
summary: Recent think-answer approaches in VLMs, such as Qwen3-VL-Thinking, boost reasoning performance by leveraging intermediate thinking steps before the final answer, but their high computational cost limits real-world deployment. To distill such capabilities into compact think-answer VLMs, a primary objective is to improve the student's ability to utilize visual evidence throughout its reasoning trace. To this end, we introduce a novel think-answer distillation framework that encourages the student to anchor its thinking on visual information by masking the student's salient reasoning prefixes. To compensate for such masked textual cues, the student is encouraged to rely more on visual evidence as an alternative source of information during distillation. Our masking strategies include: 1) token-wise salient reasoning-prefix masking, which masks high-influence reasoning prefixes selectively for each next-token prediction, and 2) self-paced masking budget scheduling, which gradually increases the masking scale according to distillation difficulty, {measured by discrepancy between teacher--student distributions. In the distillation phase, the student is guided by our salient reasoning-prefix mask, which blocks both future tokens and salient reasoning cues, in place of the standard causal mask used for auto-regressive language modeling. Experimental results show that our approach outperforms recent open-source VLMs, VLM distillation, and self-distillation methods on multimodal reasoning benchmarks, while further analyses confirm enhanced visual utilization along the student thinking process.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的思考-答案蒸馏框架，通过掩码学生模型的显著性推理前缀，迫使其在推理过程中更多依赖视觉证据，从而在保持较低计算成本的同时提升了小型VLM的推理性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM中如Qwen3-VL-Thinking等思考-答案方法虽然通过中间推理步骤提升了性能，但计算成本过高限制了实际部署。需要将这些能力蒸馏到更紧凑的模型中，核心是提升学生对视觉证据的利用能力。
AI.method: 提出基于显著性推理前缀掩码的蒸馏框架：1) 逐词显著性推理前缀掩码，对每个next-token预测选择性掩码高影响力推理前缀；2) 自步掩码预算调度，根据师生分布差异逐渐增加掩码规模。蒸馏中使用显著性推理前缀掩码替代标准因果掩码。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多模态推理基准上超越了近期开源VLM、VLM蒸馏和自蒸馏方法。进一步分析证实了学生在思考过程中的视觉利用能力得到了增强。
AI.conclusion: 通过掩码显著性推理前缀迫使学生更多依赖视觉证据的方法，能够有效蒸馏大型思考-答案VLM的能力到紧凑模型中，在保持计算效率的同时显著提升了多模态推理性能和视觉利用能力。

title: What makes a word hard to learn? Modeling L1 influence on English vocabulary difficulty
comment: Submitted to BEA 2026 at ACL. 18 pages, 13 figures
